title: Instagram Reels Video Editor
description:
JOB TITLE:

Instagram Reels Creator - Interior Design Content

BUDGET RANGE:

$25–$40 per reel (or package pricing for bulk work)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:

ABOUT STEPHENSON HOUSE:  

We are a luxury interior design studio based in Edmonton, specializing in high-end residential design. Our brand embodies sophistication, attention to detail, and superior aesthetic standards. We need someone who understands premium visual aesthetics and can translate raw footage into stunning social media content.

WHAT WE NEED:  

We have extensive raw footage from our design projects and studio operations that needs to be transformed into engaging Instagram Reels. We're looking for a video editor who specializes in social media content creation with a strong aesthetic sense.

PROJECT SCOPE:

Transform raw footage into 15-60 second Instagram Reels

Create 10-20 reels initially, with potential for ongoing work

Focus on interior design, behind-the-scenes, and project reveals

Maintain consistent brand aesthetic across all content







REQUIREMENTS:

ESSENTIAL SKILLS:

Proven experience creating Instagram Reels/TikTok content

Strong aesthetic sensibility - ability to create visually stunning content

Experience with interior design or luxury brand content preferred

Proficiency in video editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, etc.)

Understanding of Instagram's format requirements and best practices

Ability to work with provided raw footage and create compelling narratives

AESTHETIC REQUIREMENTS:

Exceptional eye for visual composition and design

Understanding of luxury brand aesthetics

Ability to create content that feels premium and sophisticated

Knowledge of current social media trends while maintaining brand integrity

Color grading and visual effects that enhance rather than distract

TECHNICAL SKILLS:

Video editing and post-production

Audio editing and music synchronization

Text overlay and graphics creation

Understanding of Instagram's technical specifications

Quick turnaround capability

WHAT WE'LL PROVIDE:

High-quality raw footage from design projects

Brand guidelines and visual reference materials

Stephenson House logo and brand assets

Content direction and creative briefs

Feedback and revisions as needed

DELIVERABLES:

Instagram Reels in proper format (1080x1920, MP4)

Optimized for engagement (trending audio, captions, effects)

2-3 concept options per piece of content

Quick revisions based on feedback

IDEAL CANDIDATE:

Someone who gets aesthetics and understands that we're in the business of creating beautiful spaces. You should be able to look at raw interior design footage and instinctively know how to make it compelling for social media while maintaining our luxury brand standards.

TO APPLY:

MANDATORY - Include these in your proposal:

Portfolio link showing Instagram Reels/TikTok content you've created

Examples of interior design or luxury brand content (if available)

Your approach to creating engaging content from raw footage

Pricing structure (per reel vs. package deals)

Typical turnaround time for projects

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

5-star rated freelancers preferred

Active portfolio with recent social media work

Understanding of current Instagram trends

Ability to work with luxury/design brands

Quick communication and professional service

LONG-TERM POTENTIAL:

This is initially a small project to test quality and fit, but we have ongoing content needs. The right freelancer could become our regular social media video partner with consistent monthly work.

title: Premium Fashion SEO Content Writer (Long-Term / Ongoing Role)
description:
About Us:

We are Spekt, a premium multi-brand fashion e-commerce retailer based in the UAE. We carry top-tier global brands (HUGO BOSS, Tommy Hilfiger, Lacoste, etc.) and compete with major luxury platforms like Ounass and Namshi. We need our website copy to reflect a high-end, curated, and premium shopping experience.



The Role:

We are looking for a highly skilled, native-level English fashion copywriter for an ongoing, long-term relationship.



Your first major project will be writing 100-120 word SEO category descriptions for our website. We will provide the category names, the specific brands to highlight, and the exact high-volume SEO keywords to include. If you crush this project, we will use you for all future website content, blog posts, and brand pages.



Our Tone of Voice (Crucial):

We absolutely DO NOT want generic, robotic, or AI-generated marketing copy (e.g., "Welcome to our store, we have the best high-quality clothes").



We write using an "Editorial Buyer" or "ASOS" style:



It must sound like a fashion magazine editor giving styling advice to a friend.



You must naturally weave in styling tips and outfit-building ideas (e.g., telling the customer to pair the shirt with wide-leg denim and chunky sneakers).



You must seamlessly integrate the provided SEO keywords without it looking forced.



Technical Requirements:



You must be comfortable hardcoding simple HTML anchor tags for links into the text. We use these descriptions to build our internal linking silo. (Example: "Filter by Nike for sporty tank tops...")



A strong understanding of modern SEO (LSI keywords, natural integration).



Strict Rule: We run all content through advanced AI detectors (like GPTZero). If you rely on ChatGPT to write your copy, please do not apply. We are looking for a unique, human, fashion-forward voice.



How to Apply:

To ensure you have read this entire description and have an eye for detail, please start your application with the word SPEKT.



In your application, you MUST provide a short, 2-sentence writing sample for a "Men's Oversized T-Shirts" category using our tone of voice. Assume the target keywords you need to include are "heavyweight cotton" and "streetwear fits".



Please also include a link to your portfolio or 2-3 previous fashion copywriting examples, and let us know your expected hourly or per-word rate.

Deborah

title: Web & Community Operations Specialist (Sewing Niche)
description:
About SewShare

SewShare is a community-driven platform on a mission to unite seamsters (sewists) —from hobbyists to professionals—through a unique ecosystem of peer-to-peer support, expert resources, and real-time collaboration. We are a scrappy startup redefining how the world sews together.



The Role

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who is not just a "tech person," but someone who genuinely loves and understands the art of sewing garments. You will be a "digital tailor," ensuring our user experience is as seamless as a well-made hem. This role combines website management, SEO,
 marketing, and community participation and research.



Key Responsibilities

Website & UX Maintenance: Review and optimize WordPress webpages for better user flow. You will build technique-specific pages and FAQ sections using templates and AI support.



SEO & Store Audits: Audit store pages and product listings to improve SEO, image quality, and overall presentation.

 Marketing: Use Flodesk to design and build engaging
s, including content creation and layout using templates.

Feature Testing: Act as a "beta tester" for new site features and user journeys to ensure everything works perfectly before launch.



Content & Graphics: Create "Sew-along" and product pages from templates. Occasionally use Canva to develop simple, professional graphics based on our existing brand templates.

Community Research: Conduct research on Reddit and other forums to gather data and engage authentically with the sewing community.



Qualifications & Requirements

MUST have a passion for sewing: You should sew garments yourself (as a hobby or professionally) and understand sewing terminology (e.g., "seams," "patterns," "notions").  You don’t have to be an expert: advanced beginner sewing level is fine.

Technical Proficiency: Experience with WordPress and a solid understanding of SEO basics (Schema, metadata, image optimization).



 Marketing: Familiarity with Flodesk (or similar tools like Mailchimp/Klaviyo).

Detail-Oriented: You are the type of person who catches a typo or a broken link from a mile away.



Design Eye: Eye for creating clean, aesthetic digital assets when needed.



Reliability: High-speed internet and the ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



What We Offer

- A long-term opportunity for growth and education within a passionate startup.

- Flexible, remote work hours that respect your local time zone (with occasional overlap for meetings).

- The chance to combine your love for sewing with your professional digital skills.

title: Part-Time Bookkeeper (U.S. Nonprofit) – Remote
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Reports To: U.S.-based Leadership / Finance Lead

Core Tools: QuickBooks Online (QBO), Bill.com, Ramp, Slack



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented, part-time Bookkeeper to support transactional accounting and select administrative functions for a U.S.-based nonprofit organization. This role is intentionally narrow in scope and execution-focused. Success in this role means accurate records, clean compliance, and reliable follow-through—not financial strategy or leadership.

This position includes predictable annual seasonality aligned with our programming cycle and requires limited daily overlap with U.S. Pacific Time hours to ensure coordination and responsiveness.



Time Commitment & Seasonality

Weekly Hours

8–10 hours per week on average

Hours may flex modestly during peak periods, but will remain part-time



Seasonal Workload Patterns

Higher volume periods:

April–September (active programming season)

December–January (year-end close, compliance, contractor reporting)

Lower volume periods:

Typically, October–November and February–March, outside of audit activity



Availability & Time Zone Alignment

Ability to work partially during U.S. Pacific Time (PT) business hours is required

Availability window: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PT

Expected real-time overlap: approximately 1.5–2 hours per workday

Remaining work may be completed asynchronously

This overlap is required for timely AP processing, reimbursements, audit follow-ups, and coordination with U.S.-based leadership via Slack.



Core Responsibilities

Accounts Payable (Primary Focus)

Process vendor bills and payments using Bill.com

Manage employee and contractor expense reimbursements

Collect, track, and maintain W-9 forms

Ensure proper coding and documentation of all AP transactions

Maintain organized digital records for audit readiness

Accounts Receivable (Limited Scope)

Provide light AR support (approximately once per month)

Assist with basic invoicing and payment tracking as needed

Compliance & Regulatory Support

Prepare and submit select professional reporting, including ASCAP / BMI filings

Support 1099 processing, including contractor tracking and year-end preparation

Audit Support (Seasonal)

Act as a liaison during the annual audit (March–June)

Collect requested financial documents and schedules

Coordinate follow-ups with internal stakeholders and external accountants

Financial Reporting (Minimal)

Run and export basic QuickBooks Online reports

No budgeting, forecasting, cash management, or financial analysis responsibilities

Administrative Support

Perform various finance-related administrative tasks as needed

Communicate clearly and professionally via Slack





Required Qualifications

Proven experience as a Bookkeeper supporting U.S.-based organizations

Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks Online (QBO)

Hands-on experience with Bill.com

Familiarity with 1099 compliance and vendor documentation

High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

Ability to work independently with clear instructions and a defined scope

Reliable internet connection and comfortable working remotely



Preferred Qualifications

Experience supporting nonprofit organizations

Familiarity with U.S. audit processes and documentation

Prior experience working with U.S.-based teams while located in the Philippines



What This Role Is (and Is Not)

This role is:

Transactional, execution-focused bookkeeping

Clearly scoped with predictable recurring tasks

Part-time and long-term in nature

This role is not:

A Controller or Finance Manager position

Responsible for payroll, budgeting, or financial strategy

A full-time or on-call role outside defined overlap hours



Why This Role Works

This role is ideal for a seasoned bookkeeper who values clarity, consistency, and precision, is comfortable with seasonal workload cycles, and prefers a well-defined, low-noise engagement over high-volume or ambiguous responsibilities.

title: Long-Form Video Editor (Fulltime)
description:
ABOUT AMPLIFY

We’re a remote-first, UK-based agency partnering with high-profile founders and entrepreneurs to grow their personal brands.

Our role is to turn their expertise into content that performs at scale.



----

ROLE OVERVIEW

We’re looking for a Long-Form Video Editor to support client delivery across podcasts, interviews, and YouTube content. This role is responsible for producing high-quality video assets while maintaining organised, efficient production workflows.



You will manage multiple client workloads simultaneously, balancing long-form edits with short-form derivatives, and ensuring all deliverables are completed to a high standard and on time.



This is a self-managed, accountable role suited to someone who can operate independently while communicating proactively within a remote team.



---

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Edit long-form content (YouTube videos, podcasts, interviews) with strong pacing, clarity, and retention

- Extract and produce short-form clips from long-form content for social distribution

- Deliver final, publish-ready assets across all formats

- Organise projects and source files for efficient collaboration and handoff

- Manage deadlines across multiple client accounts and ensure consistent output

- Communicate proactively on progress, delays, and blockers

- Apply internal systems and workflows to maintain speed and consistency

- Leverage AI tools to improve production efficiency



---

CAPACITY & OUTPUT EXPECTATIONS

- Support 2–3 client workloads simultaneously, depending on scope

- Each workload may include:

    - Long-form YouTube/podcast editing (core)

    - Supporting short-form clip creation

Output expectations will vary depending on complexity and motion graphics requirements, but consistency and reliability are critical.



---

REQUIREMENTS

- Demonstrated experience editing long-form video content (YouTube, podcasts, interviews)

- Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention

- Experience creating short-form content tailored to social platforms

- Proficiency in editing software (e.g. Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve)

- Familiarity with AI-assisted editing tools and workflows

- Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in parallel

- Strong organisational skills and clean file management practices

- Clear, reliable communication and ability to flag issues early

- Self-directed, accountable, and comfortable working in a remote environment



---

NICE TO HAVE

- Motion graphics / light animation

- Experience editing for founders, creators, or personal brands

- Understanding of platform-specific editing styles



---

WORKING STYLE

- Remote, async-friendly

- Deadline-driven and systems-oriented

- Focused on consistency, speed, and quality



---

COMPENSATION & WORKING TERMS

- Monthly compensation of $1,500–$2,000 (based on experience and performance)

- Flexible async working hours given hours are fulfilled and client deadlines are met

- 25 days paid leave per year



---

WHY JOIN AMPLIFY?

- Work with high-calibre clients

- Consistent, stable work

- Structured, efficient workflows

- Remote-first flexibility

title: Partner Onboarding Specialist
description:
About the Role

We're hiring a Partner Onboarding Specialist to guide new partners through our onboarding program. After a prospect applies, you'll be the person who walks them through getting set up in our system — handling everything from initial calls and contracts to technical setup of their accounts. This is a hands-on role that blends customer support, technical setup, and relationship management.

You'll work directly with partners over phone, text,
, and screen-share sessions. Some partners are tech-savvy, many are not — your job is to make the process feel smooth either way.

What You'll Do



Conduct outbound and inbound calls with prospects and newly approved partners

- Walk partners through a detailed onboarding checklist over screen-share, often guiding them step-by-step through their device

- Set up and configure new partner accounts, including
 setup, two-factor authentication, and account security configuration

- Generate and send contracts to partners

- Troubleshoot technical issues in real time as they come up during onboarding

- Maintain accurate records in our internal documentation system for every partner profile

- Follow up with partners via SMS and
 on an ongoing communication schedule (5–7 days post-onboarding and beyond)

- Build and maintain prospecting lists as needed

- Other onboarding and partner-success tasks as assigned



Requirements (all required)

- Clear, professional English communication — both verbal (for calls) and written (for texts and
s)

- Strong customer service skills — patient, friendly, and able to keep partners calm and confident through technical steps they don't fully understand

- Tech-savvy — comfortable navigating browser settings, mobile OS settings (both iOS and Android),
 configuration, two-factor authentication, QR codes, and remote-access tools. You don't need to be a developer, but you should be the kind of person friends and family call when their tech breaks

- Problem solver — every onboarding has unexpected curveballs. You need to think on your feet and figure things out without getting stuck

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to follow a multi-step checklist exactly without skipping steps

- Available to take and make calls during US business hours

- Available for on-call coverage when necessary — partner onboardings and follow-ups don't always happen on a perfect 9-to-5 schedule, so flexibility to handle occasional calls or issues outside standard hours is required

- Discretion and trustworthiness — you'll be handling partner account credentials and sensitive information



Preference 

- Experience with AI tools and systems — we're looking for someone who actively uses AI in their workflow (ChatGPT, Claude, automation tools, etc.) and ideally has experience building or setting up AI-powered workflows, automations, or systems. If you're the type of person who uses AI to work smarter and faster — not just someone who's heard of it — that's a major plus

- Prior experience with customer onboarding, technical support, or virtual assistant work

- Experience with screen-share-based remote support

- Background supporting US-based clients

description:
About the Role

We're hiring a creative, AI-savvy specialist to build and manage
 pages for our company. You'll be responsible for creating new pages, developing unique page identities, and keeping them active with consistent, engaging content. The ideal candidate is someone who can design an AI-powered workflow that handles much of the content creation and posting process — so we can scale this across multiple pages efficiently.

This is a role for someone who thinks in systems, not just tasks.



What You'll Do

- Create and set up new

- Build AI-powered workflows and automations to generate, schedule, and publish content at scale — using tools like ChatGPT, -Claude, Make, Zapier, or custom solutions

- Monitor page health, engagement metrics, and adjust strategy accordingly

- Stay current on
's algorithm, content guidelines, and best practices

Requirements (all required)

- AI workflow experience is a must — you should already be building automations and using AI tools daily. We want someone who can design a system, not just manually post content. Show us what you've built

- Strong understanding of
 — page creation, content types, engagement strategies, algorithm behavior, and what makes a page look established and trustworthy

- Content creation skills — ability to write in different voices and tones, curate relevant content, and create posts that feel human and natural (not robotic AI slop)

- Systems thinker — you'll be building repeatable workflows, not doing one-off tasks. You should enjoy building processes that run efficiently with minimal manual input

- Clear English communication — written and verbal

- Detail-oriented and organized — managing multiple pages with different identities requires strong organizational skills

- Available during US business hours



Preferences

- Experience managing multiple social media accounts or pages simultaneously

 advertising or page growth strategies



What we're looking for in your application

title: WRITER VA
description:

title: Investigative Research Assistant - Real Estate
description:
We are a real estate company focused on solving complex title issues — properties with deceased owners, missing heirs, fractured ownership, and legal complications that prevent a normal sale. Our team specializes in deep research to understand ownership, identify the right parties, and create a clear path to resolution. This is not a high-volume operation — we prioritize precision, problem-solving, and the ability to navigate messy situations where others cannot.



------



This exercise is the application.



We are evaluating how you think, how deep you go, and how you connect information.



This is a research-heavy role. You will operate as an investigative researcher, finding people who are difficult to locate and building accurate family trees tied to property ownership.



I’ve attached two sample properties. For each one, your job is to figure out:

- Who is on title?

- Are they alive or deceased?

- If deceased, who are the rightful heirs?

- Are those heirs alive or deceased?

- If not, what does the full family tree look like?

- What is the condition of the property (well-maintained vs. distressed)?

- Are there any relevant signals tied to the owners/heirs (news, legal issues, arrest records, etc.)?



We focus on situations where owners are often unable to resolve things themselves. This can include financial distress, legal issues, or complex family dynamics.



We are not looking for surface-level answers. We are looking for people who can identify patterns and connect the dots — especially signals that point to difficult or high-friction ownership situations.



This is not a volume game. We expect ~10 cases per day, done with depth and accuracy.



Property 1 (DO NOT REACH OUT TO OWNERS):

19468 VFW Rd. Brooksville, FL 34601



Property 2 (DO NOT REACH OUT TO OWNERS):

702 Sheldon Cir. Port Orange, FL 32127



THE ONLY WAY TO APPLY IS GOING THROUGH THIS APPLICATION FORM:

title: Lead Generation Specialist for Chicago Digital Agency — Long-Term Role + Performance Bonuses
description:
READ THIS ENTIRE POST BEFORE APPLYING. Applications that skip steps will be deleted without reply.

We’re Amply Systems, a digital marketing and SEO agency based in Chicago, Illinois (USA). We help small and mid-sized American businesses rank on Google, build websites, and manage their IT. We’re small, growing fast, and looking for one sharp person to join us long-term.

This is not a call center job. This is not a customer service job. This is a lead generation and outreach role — you will be the engine that finds potential clients for our agency and gets them on our calendar.



WHAT YOU’LL DO DAILY:

 • Build and clean lists of small businesses in Chicago and other US cities (law firms, dentists, contractors, etc.) using tools we’ll teach you

 • Send cold
s and LinkedIn messages using scripts we provide — from our accounts, in our voice

 • Manage replies — qualify interested prospects, handle objections politely, book qualified leads to our calendar

 • Keep our CRM clean and updated every single day

 • Send a Friday report:
s sent, opens, replies, meetings booked



WHO YOU ARE:

 • Excellent written English — not perfect, but professional. Americans must believe they’re talking to a colleague

 • Detail-obsessed. You catch typos in your sleep

 • Self-driven. I’ll train you hard for 2 weeks, then I expect full ownership

 • Fast learner who Googles before asking

 • Stable internet, backup power, quiet workspace

 • Available 4+ hours overlap with Chicago business hours (9pm–1am Manila time minimum)



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED):

 • Previous lead gen, cold
, or appointment setting experience

 • Familiarity with HubSpot, Apollo, Instantly, or LinkedIn Sales Navigator

 • Experience working with US-based agencies or B2B companies



THE DEAL:

 • $5/hour USD, starting at 20 hours/week = ~$430/month base

 • $25 bonus per qualified appointment booked — prospect must attend, be a verified business owner or decision maker, and stay on the call at least 10 minutes. No shortcuts.

 • Paid weekly via your preferred method

 • Performance-first role — hours scale to 40/week within 60 days if you’re producing

 • Long-term position with a clear growth path. I’m hiring one person to grow with the agency, not cycling through ten



HOW TO APPLY — FOLLOW EVERY STEP OR YOU’RE OUT:

Send me a message with exactly this structure. Any applicant who does not follow this format will be rejected — this is your first test.

 1. Subject line: Chicago Lead Gen — [Your First Name]

 2. In the body, answer these in order:

a. In 2-3 sentences, what does Amply Systems do? (Check our website: 
)

b. Name one specific thing you’d change or improve about our website. Be honest — I won’t be offended.

c. Write a 4-sentence cold
 to the owner of a Chicago dental practice selling them on SEO services. Make it feel human, not like spam.

d. What’s your internet speed? Run a test at 
 and paste the number.

e. Tell me about a time you had to learn something hard, fast. Keep it short.

f. What time zone are you in, and what hours can you overlap with Chicago Central Time?

g. At the very top of your reply, write the word “CHICAGO” in all caps. If I don’t see it, I don’t read the rest.

 3. Do not send a resume as your first message. If I like your application, I’ll ask for one.



I will reply within 5 business days to applicants who follow the format. Everyone else — good luck on your search.

Looking forward to meeting the right person.

— Jason

Founder, Amply Systems

Chicago, IL

- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

nts

title: Cold Caller — Book Appointments for Digital Marketing Agency (Evening PH Hours)
description:
We're a small digital marketing agency helping local service businesses (plumbers, roofers, electricians, pressure washers) get found on Google. We need someone who can pick up the phone, call business owners, and book them into a 15-minute strategy session with our team.



This is outbound cold calling. You'll be calling contractors in Southwest Florida who need more customers but aren't showing up on Google. Most of them answer the phone hoping it's a new job — so when they realize it's not, you need the skills to turn that frustration into curiosity.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Make 60-100+ outbound calls per shift from a provided lead list

- Follow a proven script to introduce our Google optimization service

- Handle objections from busy, skeptical business owners

- Book qualified prospects onto our calendar

- Log every call outcome in a simple tracker



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Proven outbound cold calling experience (B2B strongly preferred)

- Thick skin — you'll hear "no" 50 times a day and keep dialing

- Clear, confident English — you're calling American business owners who are mid-workday

- Comfortable working evening PH hours (9:00 PM - 2:00 AM Manila time, Mon-Fri)

- Assertive but not aggressive — you push through resistance with warmth, not pressure



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY:

Top performers will have the chance to move into a closing role — running the actual strategy sessions and signing clients. If you're hungry and want to grow beyond just setting appointments, this is the path.



HOW TO APPLY:

To show you read this and pay attention to detail:

1. Use this exact subject line: "CLE Cold Caller — [Your Full Name]"

2. Include a 60-second voice recording (
) — introduce yourself and read this line naturally: "Hi, I'm calling from Clear Local Edge. I noticed your business isn't showing up when people in Naples search Google for what you do. I'd love to show you exactly where you're losing calls to your competitors — it's a free 15-minute walkthrough. Do you have time Thursday or Friday?"

3. Share your DISC personality profile scores (take the free test at 
/disc if you haven't already — we're looking for High Dominance + some Influence)

4. One paragraph about your most relevant calling experience — how many calls per day, what you were selling, and your booking/conversion rate if you know it



Applications missing the voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)

Detail-Oriented, Fast Learner + CRM Preferred

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Location: Remote

Working Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (Monday–Friday)



About This Role

We are a U.S.-based promotional products company with structured systems, clear SOPs, and a fast-moving work environment.



This role is primarily execution-focused, but we are specifically looking for someone who learns quickly, thinks clearly, and can handle multiple types of tasks depending on priority.

Strong candidates will also have prior experience with:

• HubSpot (updating contacts, notes, pipelines, task tracking, data management) 

• QuickBooks or accounting support (invoices, payment tracking, reconciliations, records) 

These are highly preferred skills and will be a major advantage.



What Makes This Role Different

Most assistant roles are repetitive.

This role requires someone who can:

• Learn systems quickly 

• Switch between tasks (quotes, orders,
s, admin work) 

• Understand context — not just follow steps 

• Keep systems updated and organized 

If you:

• Pick things up faster than others 

• Notice patterns quickly 

• Enjoy figuring things out 

• Like keeping things organized and accurate 

This role will be a great fit.



Core Responsibilities

Daily Operations

• Manage and organize daily operational tasks following established SOPs 

• Review and prioritize
s from suppliers and clients 

• Support quote and order processes with accurate data entry and tracking 

• Prepare quotes by reviewing supplier pricing and calculating margins accurately 

• Maintain clean, organized files and internal records 

• Provide daily work summaries and status updates 

CRM / System Management

• Update contacts, deals, notes, and follow-ups in HubSpot 

• Keep CRM records accurate and current 

• Organize lead and client information properly 

• Track activities and reminders inside the CRM 

Accounting Support

• Assist with invoicing and payment tracking 

• Update records inside QuickBooks 

• Monitor invoice status and unpaid balances 

• Help maintain accurate financial/admin records 

Communication Support

• Prepare clear, professional English drafts for internal and client communication 

• Rewrite supplier messages into polished client-facing
s 

• Follow instructions precisely and ask clarification questions when needed 

(Detailed step-by-step training and SOPs are provided after onboarding.)



What We Are Looking For (Important)

1) Extreme Attention to Detail (Non-Negotiable)

• You double-check your work before submitting 

• You catch small errors others miss 

• You are careful with numbers, product details, and timelines 

2) Fast Learner & Quick Thinker

• You understand new systems quickly 

• You do not need repeated explanations 

• You can connect information across tasks 

3) CRM Experience Preferred

• Experience using HubSpot or similar CRM tools 

• Comfortable updating data, notes, statuses, and pipelines 

• Understand the importance of clean CRM data 

4) Accounting Experience Preferred

• Experience with QuickBooks or similar tools 

• Familiar with invoices, payment tracking, and records 

• Comfortable handling numbers accurately 

5) Strong Number & Logic Skills

• Comfortable with Excel or Google Sheets 

• Able to understand pricing, margins, and calculations 

• Naturally verify numbers for accuracy 

6) Ability to Switch Between Tasks

• Some days focus on quotes 

• Some days focus on orders 

• You adapt based on priorities 

7) Clear Written English

• Able to write professional
s clearly and confidently 

• Understand tone and clarity 

8) Reliability & Long-Term Mindset

• Seeking a stable, long-term role 

• Consistent and dependable 



Who This Role Is NOT For

• Someone who prefers only repetitive, single-task work 

• Someone who needs constant step-by-step instructions 

• Someone uncomfortable with numbers or switching tasks 

• Someone who dislikes learning new systems 



What You Do NOT Need

• Promotional products industry experience 

• Advanced technical skills 

All systems and workflows are trained internally.



How to Apply (Strict)

Only candidates who follow instructions exactly will be considered.

First line of your application must include the word:

CRM

Step 1 – Written Application

Please answer all of the following:

1. Introduce yourself (5–7 sentences) 

2. Describe a situation where you had to learn something quickly 

3. Describe a role where accuracy was critical 

4. What experience do you have with HubSpot or CRM systems? 

5. What experience do you have with QuickBooks or invoicing/accounting tasks? 

6. Rate your written English ability (1–10) 

7. Confirm you can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (Monday–Friday) 

8. Describe your experience with spreadsheets (Excel or Google Sheets) and provide an example 



Step 2 – Voice or Video (1–2 minutes)

Please include:

• Your name and background 

• Why you consider yourself detail-oriented 

• An example of how you learned something quickly 



Subject Line

VA – Detail-Oriented + CRM/Admin

 experience

nts

title: Senior Tax Accountant - AU
description:
Senior Tax Accountant







Your typical month would look like this: 



Daily Morning huddles with the team

Preparing and reviewing Tax & BAS work

Completing Business returns and financial reports

Tax Planning and providing insights to clients to help them manage cash flow and succeed in business

Giving frequent constructive feedback to other team members to produce quality work and meet deadlines via Teams Video Calls as first preference where possible

Supporting junior members in scheduling their workflow 

Sending good vibes when someone did a great job and helping build team rapport through continuous check-ins

Monthly meetings with the CEO

Working long or short days depending on workflow

Working from home

Having a laugh at the expense of one of us

We value



Quality - Completing work right the first time every time

Commitment - Commitment to self, the team our clients and our tasks

Growth - We are curious & open mind. We challenge the status quo and believe in continuous learning

Attitude - We believe that teamwork makes the dream work. We believe in fun, solutions and smiles

Communication - We communicate openly and honestly. We are empathic and embrace genuine connections





Please DO APPLY IF



You're passionate about small business

You are a natural teacher and passionate about helping others

You've been praised for your attention to detail

You're known as the tax expert

You are a can-do person who takes ownership of their work

You are the go-to person for executing tasks

You want to work in a fun environment with great people

You're committed to personal and professional development

You’re an implementer

You’re happy to be thrown in the deep end at times and will take ownership of jobs and work to deliver outcomes without hand holding

You have great English & communication skills

You’re a natural cheerleader





Please DO NOT APPLY if



You're only in it for the money

·        You have less than 5 years of experience in completing business returns



You don't want to join in office fun

You do not have experience with Xero

Youd rather be told what to do than take action

You’re not an out of the box thinker

You don’t really like people

You prefer to
 or speak via text than video calls

You’re a people pleaser

You don’t like helping people achieve goals





Qualifications or of similar end 



Bachelor in Business and Commerce major in Accounting

Certified Practising Accountant Certificate

Core Technical Skills



Preparation of Financial Statements: Complete financial reporting from start to finish, ensuring accuracy and compliance.

Taxation Expertise: In-depth knowledge of business taxes, including GST, income tax, and FBT compliance.

FBT Returns and Div 7A Compliance: Familiarity with handling FBT obligations and Div 7A transactions without supervision.

Tax Planning: Proficient in identifying tax-saving opportunities and providing strategic tax advice.

 SMSF Compliance and Reporting: Expertise in managing compliance and reporting requirements for Self-Managed Superannuation Funds.

Tax Planning: Proficient in identifying tax-saving opportunities and providing comprehensive tax advice, ensuring clients are optimising their tax positions.

Reviewing Junior Work: Capable of quality-checking and mentoring juniors' work, providing constructive feedback to improve accuracy and efficiency.

Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills



Process Improvement: Identify areas for workflow optimisation and contribute to refining accounting and tax procedures.

System & Software Knowledge



Xero Expertise: Proficient in Xero, with hands-on experience in bookkeeping, reporting, and tax functions within the software.





Applicants MUST submit a video of themselves answering the following:



Why you believe they would be a good candidate for the role

Why do you want to work with us

Why you’re seeking new employment





Additionally, please provide the following:



CV (Curriculum Vitae): Please provide a detailed CV highlighting your relevant work experience, education, and skills. Be sure to include your contact information.

Cover Letter: Submit a cover letter that introduces yourself and explains why you are a suitable candidate for this position. Highlight your key qualifications and express your interest in joining our team.

References: Include the contact information of at least three professional references who can speak to your qualifications and work experience. Please provide their names, titles,
 addresses, and phone numbers.

US (PST or EST) time zone overlap (minimum 4 hours); Time Doctor is Required



ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing AI appointment generation agency serving high-value healthcare and aesthetics clients, including med spas, LASIK clinics, IVF centres, and plastic surgery practices. We generate premium appointments that convert into paying clients, and we’re looking for a Media Buyer who already has proven experience in these industries.



Direct experience running paid campaigns for med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery, a STRONG ADVANTAGE



WHAT YOU’LL MANAGE

•	Large monthly ad budgets across 15+ high-value client accounts in aesthetics and healthcare.

•	B2B campaigns: surgery consultations, IVF bookings, clinic demos.

•	B2C campaigns: med spa treatments, LASIK bookings, IVF discovery calls, plastic surgery consultations.

•	Full campaign lifecycle: strategy, setup, scale, optimisation.

•	Advanced audience segmentation and lookalike modelling.

•	CRM and marketing stack integration: GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly.



CREATIVE RESPONSIBILITIES

•	Develop AI-driven content with heygen, Sora, ElevenLabs, nano banana pro.

•	Design and motion graphics using Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, CapCut.

•	Test creative angles, hooks, and ad formats specifically for med spa, LASIK, IVF, and plastic surgery clients.

•	Analyse creative performance to improve future campaigns.

•	Maintain brand consistency while scaling creative assets.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS

•	B2C Appointments: $50–150 CPA (varies by service)

•	B2B Appointments: $100–400 CPA (qualified consultations)

•	Minimum 2.5% CTR across campaigns

•	Maintain 60%+ landing page conversion rate

•	70%+ show rate for booked appointments

•	Weekly performance analysis with actionable optimisation insights



EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS

•	2+ years
/Meta Ads experience, with direct experience in med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery.

•	Portfolio demonstrating ad spend managed and appointment generation results.

•	Proven ability to scale campaigns 3x+ while maintaining cost targets.

•	Experience running both B2B and B2C appointment campaigns.

•	Multiple industry experience preferred.



WHAT TO PROVE IN YOUR APPLICATION

•	Screenshots of ad account dashboards showing spend and performance.

•	Specific cost per appointment improvements achieved (with numbers).

•	Biggest campaign rescue/turnaround story.

•	Experience managing large monthly ad budgets in healthcare or aesthetics.



TRAINING AND GROWTH PATH

•	First 30 days: Onboarding with our proven appointment generation frameworks.

•	Month 2–3: Full account ownership and performance accountability.

•	Ongoing: Advanced appointment generation strategies, AI creative training, and mentorship.

•	Performance bonuses tied to client retention and appointment quality.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

•	Advanced
 Business Manager and Ads Manager skills

•	Conversion tracking setup and optimisation

•	CRM integration experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly)

•	Landing page optimisation knowledge

•	Video editing software familiarity (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro)



PERSONALITY TRAITS WE’RE SEEKING

•	Obsessed with appointment quality and show rates, not just volume

•	Creative problem solver who thinks beyond templates

•	Takes ownership of results and client success

•	Proactive communication about performance trends

•	Organised, trustworthy, and able to deliver in a timely manner

•	Understands that compensation is based on a 40-hour work week

•	Understands that the use of Time Doctor is a productivity measure, not a matter of trust.



RED FLAGS (DON’T APPLY IF)

•	You are not available for full-time 40-hour work week

•	You cannot provide specific metrics from previous roles

•	You cannot commit to US (PST or EST) time zone overlap



COMPENSATION DETAILS

•	Base: $1,500–2,000/month depending on experience

•	Performance bonuses: $200–500/month for hitting appointment targets

•	Annual raises: 15–25% for top performers

•	Paid vacation and sick leave eligibility after 3 months

•	13th Month Salary eligibility after 3 months

•	Access to premium software, AI tools, live masterminds & paid communities



HOW TO APPLY

•	Start your message with: "Yes, I have read the job ad and I understand it fully"

•	Latest resume/CV with work history up to 2026



SELECTION PROCESS

1.	Application review (2–3 days)

2.	Skills assessment test (appointment generation scenarios)

3.	Video interview with performance deep-dive

4.	1-week paid trial project with real client account/campaign

5.	Final decision and onboarding



Please do not apply if you are not comfortable with Time Doctor as this is a non-negotiable requirement of the role. Thanks and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Creative Strategist (Remote)
description:
Company: Socialyte

Location: Remote (Philippines / Mexico preferred)

Type: Part-Time Independent Contractor



Who We Are

Socialyte is a fast-growing content strategy agency helping brands show up online with purpose and precision. We're a company with a remote team that moves fast, and genuinely loves what we do. We're looking for a sharp Creative Strategist to grow with us.



What You Can Earn

We want to be fully transparent about compensation because we think this structure is actually a great deal for the right person.



Base Salary: $138/month

This covers your core ongoing responsibilities.

On top of that, you earn per client:

Month 1 (Strategy Build): $300 per new client you onboard — every single client, every package

Month 2+, per active client each month:



Standard package ? +$150/month

Execution package ? +$180/month

Growth package ? +$200/month

Monetization package ? +$250/month



What does this look like in practice?

With just 3 active clients on mixed packages, you're looking at $600–$900/month on top of your base, and it grows every time a new client is onboarded. The more clients you manage well, the more you earn. This is a role that rewards quality and consistency.



The Role

We're looking for someone who can take a client's goals and turn them into a clear, confident content plan — without needing to be walked through it.

This is a strategy-first role. You won't be filming, editing, or posting. You'll be building the system that the whole production team follows. If you love understanding why content performs and creating frameworks that make execution effortless, this is your role.



What You'll Own



- Client content strategy — content pillars, audience positioning, and repeatable frameworks built from client goals

- Content planning — monthly calendars, platform allocation, scripted vs. unscripted breakdown

- Production prep — scripts, talking points, shot lists, and format direction

- Creative Execution Packs — full editing instructions including hooks, pacing, structure, music, and branding, handed off cleanly to the team

- Content review & approval — reviewing edited content against strategy, providing clear revision notes

- Folder & drive management — keeping all client folders organized, correctly named, and up to date

- Performance & optimization — monthly analytics reviews, refining hooks and formats based on what's working

- Trend research — staying ahead on TikTok, Instagram, and TikTok Creative Center; updating shared hook and format libraries





What This Role Is Not

Just to be clear, this role does not include filming or editing content, posting or scheduling, client-facing communication, ClickUp task management, or asset uploading. Those live with other tea
mbers.



What We're Looking For



You must have:

- Strong English communication skills — both written and spoken. You'll be working with an English-speaking team and leading strategy walkthroughs. Confident, clear English is essential for this role.

- Solid understanding of short-form content strategy (TikTok, Instagram Reels)

- Experience analyzing viral content and identifying what makes it work

Ability to write execution documents so clear that creators and editors can follow them with zero confusion

- Comfort using AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT — this is a required part of the job, not a bonus

- Strong async communication habits — you'll work primarily through ClickUp and Loom

- Self-directed and organized — you manage your own workload without being chased



Nice to have:

- Experience with Canva, Vista Social, TikTok Creative Center, Poppy AI

- Background in social media marketing, content production, or creative direction

- Previous experience in a remote async team





What Good Performance Looks Like:

- New client strategies delivered within 5 business days of intake

- At least 50 viral videos analyzed per niche per strategy build

- Execution documents that require little to no follow-up questions

- Folders and drives that are clean and current at all times

- AI tools used regularly for research, ideation, and iteration

- Responses to messages within 24 hours on business days





Tools You'll Use

ClickUp · Claude AI · Poppy AI · Vista Social · TikTok Creative Center · Instagram · Canva



You're the Right Fit If…



- You can look at a client's goals and immediately start mapping out a content strategy

- You stay on top of trends because it genuinely interests you, not because someone asked

- You take ownership — if the strategy isn't working, you're already thinking about what to change

- You communicate clearly, meet your deadlines, and don't need to be reminded





?? How to Apply — Please Read Before Applying

To be considered for this role, your application must include:



- A portfolio or work samples showing your experience as a Creative Strategist — this can include strategy documents, content frameworks, execution packs, content calendars, or similar work. Applications submitted without a portfolio or relevant work samples will not be reviewed, no exceptions.

- A short intro about your background and why this role is a good fit for you

- The AI tools and platforms you currently use in your workflow

- Your availability for work

title: Senior Bookkeeper with Automation Experience — QuickBooks/Xero + Zapier/Make — Long-Term Role
description:
WHAT WE DO

ReviewArmour is a reputation management company operating across Canada and the US. We're scaling fast and need a senior bookkeeper to build and run a fully automated accounting system from day one.



THE ROLE (TWO PARTS)



PART 1 — 7-Day Setup Project (Fixed Fee: 50,000 PHP + up to 20,000 PHP completion bonus)

You will build a complete accounting system from scratch including:

- QuickBooks Online or Xero (your choice, justify it) fully configured

- Integrations: Stripe, Interac E-Transfer, Wise, PayPal, business credit/debit cards, crypto (BTC/ETH/USDT)

- Automated expense capture (screenshot/receipt to system)

- Zapier or Make automations for rules-based categorization and bank feed sync

- Dual-basis reporting: accrual (deals closed) AND cash (payments collected) visible simultaneously

- Accounts Receivable aging with overdue flags

- Per-deal gross profit tracking (client revenue minus fulfilment contractor cost, linked per job)

- Anti-duplication controls (Stripe-to-bank transfers must NEVER count as revenue)

- Split payment handling (one deal paid in 3 installments = ONE revenue event)

- Live dashboard showing: revenue sold vs collected, gross profit, net profit, expenses by category, outstanding receivables

- Automated 2-day snapshots, weekly summaries, and bi-weekly efficiency analysis reports

- Complete SOP document + 10-minute recorded walkthrough video



PART 2 — Ongoing Monthly Engagement (30,000 PHP/month)

Starts after setup is confirmed complete. Includes:

- Full monthly reconciliation of all accounts

- Monthly P&L (accrual + cash, dollars + percentages)

- Bi-weekly efficiency analysis flagging inefficiencies

- Quarterly tax-readiness summary

- Processing expense screenshots within 48 hours

- Monitoring all automations, fixing broken syncs within 24 hours

- Proactive — you chase missing info, not the other way around

- Ad-hoc questions and system adjustments



PAYMENT TERMS

- Setup: 50% on start, 50% on confirmed delivery

- Completion bonus: Up to 20,000 PHP based on clean delivery (no bugs, full SOP, working walkthrough video)

- Monthly: Paid after monthly deliverables confirmed each month



MUST-HAVE SKILLS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

- 3+ years bookkeeping for North American businesses (US/Canada)

- Expert in QuickBooks Online OR Xero (not beginner-level)

- Hands-on automation experience with Zapier or Make (Integromat)

- Experience handling Stripe payouts and preventing double-counting

- Comfortable with multi-currency (USD/CAD) and crypto transaction tracking (Koinly, CoinTracker, or similar)

- Strong written English — you will write bi-weekly analysis reports

- Proactive communicator — you ask for missing info, not wait



NICE-TO-HAVE

- Experience with GoHighLevel, Wise, or Interac

- Dashboard building (Google Data Studio, Fathom, LivePlan, or native)

- Prior work with service businesses that track gross profit per deal



COMMITMENT

Full-time or dedicated part-time. This is long-term — we want someone who grows with the business. Timezone flexibility required for occasional overlap with EST.



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY — APPLICATIONS IGNORED OTHERWISE)



1. The FIRST LINE of your application must be: "I build systems, not spreadsheets."



2. Then answer this question in 3–5 sentences: "If a client pays a $1,500 USD deal across 3 installments over 4 weeks, how do you record it so it shows as ONE revenue event in both accrual and cash views? Name the exact tool and feature you'd use."



3. List your top 2 automation builds you're most proud of — what problem they solved and what tool you used.



4. Attach or link to a screenshot of a real dashboard or P&L you've built (client names blurred is fine).



5. State your preferred software (QBO or Xero) and why.



6. Confirm your availability to start within 7 days and attend a 30-minute video interview on Google Meet this week.



URGENCY

We are starting this project within 7 days. Interviews are happening this week. First qualified applicants get priority.



I will personally review every application that follows the instructions above. Applications that don't follow them get auto-rejected — not because I'm strict, but because if you can't follow 6 simple instructions, you can't run this system.

description:
We are a small Maryland law firm that principally practices family law, wills and estates, probate, criminal law, real estate, and general civil work. In our practice, we have two attorneys: Jac E. Knust has practiced for 53 years, and Matthew E. Fox has practiced for about 20 years. We have one remote staff attorney and one in-office legal assistant.



We're hopeful of finding a seasoned, competent bookkeeper/office manager with experience with law firms, law firm trust accounts, and the CLIO case management system. We are flexible with full-time or part-time, but prefer full-time. It is highly desirable that you have had some experience with artificial intelligence. A person with a CPA designation would be highly desirable.

title: Appointment Setter / Phone Sales Assistant for U.S. Insurance Agency
description:
Arena Insurance Group is hiring a reliable and energetic Appointment Setter to help schedule life insurance presentations for our licensed brokers in the United States.



Your job is to call leads, follow up with interested prospects, handle basic objections, and book appointments onto broker calendars.



This is a long-term remote opportunity with growth potential for the right person.



Responsibilities:

• Make outbound calls daily to leads

• Follow scripts and training

• Schedule appointments

• Confirm upcoming appointments

• Update CRM notes

• Follow up with old leads



Requirements:

• Strong spoken English

• Clear phone voice

• Comfortable making many calls daily

• Positive attitude

• Reliable internet and headset

• Quiet workspace

• Sales or call center experience preferred



Schedule:

U.S. Eastern Time business hours (part-time or full-time)



Pay:

Hourly pay + performance bonuses

$5 if appointment shows

$20 if broker closes sale



To apply:



1. Send resume

2. Send short voice recording introducing yourself

3. Describe any phone sales or appointment setting experience





To confirm you read this job post, start your application with the word: ARENA

title: Personal assistant/ Video Editor
description:
About the Role

I’m Robert Bednarz, Founder & CEO of High Caliber Home — a veteran-owned, rapidly scaling home services company (electrical, HVAC, plumbing) based in Illinois. I’m looking for a sharp, reliable, and highly skilled right-hand person to help me run my day-to-day while producing high-quality video content for the business.

This is a hybrid role. Video editing is the #1 priority — you must be genuinely excellent at it. The remaining time will be spent on executive assistant work: keeping me organized, handling administrative tasks, and being the person I can hand things off to and trust they’ll get done.

If you’re someone who takes ownership, communicates proactively, and takes pride in delivering polished work — we’ll get along great.

title: Affiliate Sales Rep (Remote – Warm Leads Provided)
description:
Job Description

We are looking for motivated, high-energy sales reps to join our remote call center team. This is not cold calling — you will be speaking with warm leads who have already shown interest in our products (abandoned checkout, past customers, and subscribers).



Your role is simple: follow our proven script, build quick rapport, and close sales over the phone. You’ll also have the ability to send customers your personal affiliate link or discount code to complete purchases.



We sell high-converting wellness products with strong demand, making it easier for you to close consistently.



This is a performance-based opportunity with serious earning potential for the right person.



What You’ll Be Doing



Calling warm leads (no cold calling)

Following a simple, proven script

Handling basic objections and closing sales

Sending your affiliate link/discount code via text if needed

Upselling additional products when appropriate



Compensation (This is where it gets exciting)

You are paid per sale through an affiliate commission.



Average Order Value: $56.12

Average Profit Per Order: ~$30



Commission: 15% per sale

? You earn about $8–$10 per sale



Realistic Earnings:



15 sales/day = $120–$150/day ? $840–$1,050/week

30 sales/day = $240–$300/day ? $1,680–$2,100/week



Top performers can scale beyond this.



We provide the leads. Your income depends on how well you close.



Why This Is Different



No cold calling

Warm, high-intent leads

Proven products that already convert

Simple system — just plug in and close

Unlimited earning potential



Requirements



Strong communication skills

Confident speaking on the phone

Ability to follow a script and adapt naturally

Reliable and consistent

Sales experience is a plus, but not required

title: Operations Assistant
description:
A successful applicant will have strong experience with Buildium, prior experience with tenant relations/property management role, must be able to manage multiple properties and stay organized. This is a remote role, and applicants must be comfortable using RingCentral, Buildium, talking on the phone with tenants, and must not have a strong accent/should be easy to understand.



We operate mobile home parks in the USA. We are a growing company and are hiring for strong performers, looking for a sustainable career.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat !
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree
