title: customer support manager
description:
We are currently looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Agent to join our team.



Role Overview:  

You will be responsible for handling customer inquiries via
 and Shopify Inbox, ensuring fast, professional, and helpful responses that reflect our brand standards.



Key Responsibilities:

- Respond to customer
s in a timely and professional manner  

- Manage and reply to messages through Shopify Inbox (live chat)  

- Handle order-related inquiries (tracking, delays, refunds, exchanges)  

- Resolve customer issues efficiently while maintaining a positive tone  

- Escalate complex cases when necessary  

- Keep conversations organized and properly documented  



Requirements:

- Strong written English communication skills  

- Previous experience in customer support (eCommerce preferred)  

- Familiarity with Shopify, order tracking tools, and customer service platforms  

- Ability to handle high volumes of messages daily  

- Problem-solving mindset and attention to detail  

- Availability to work [insert your preferred hours/timezone]  



Nice to Have:

- Experience with tools like notion - AI tools 

- Understanding of eCommerce workflows and customer expectations  



What We Offer:

- Long-term opportunity  

- Flexible remote work  

- Competitive compensation based on experience  



If you're interested, please send:

1. Your experience in customer support  

2. Any relevant tools you’ve used  

3. Your availability  

4. A short sample response to this scenario:  

   “My order hasn’t arrived yet, and I’m very frustrated.”



We’re looking for someone proactive, organized, and committed to delivering excellent customer experience.

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant: FBA, Private Label Specialist
description:
Position: Amazon FBA Virtual Assistant

Our Business Model: Private Label (not Wholesale, Online Arbitrage)

Full-time. 40 hours each week. Please do not apply if you are holding other jobs.

Remote (Work-from-home)



REQUIREMENTS:

-FEMALE applicants only

-Must have proven work experience as an Amazon VA

-Must have a reliable, fully functional computer suitable for daily work

-Must have a stable internet connection with a minimum speed of 20 Mbps

-Strong communication skills, with proficiency in written and spoken English

-Strong research and analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven improvements

-Detail-oriented and highly organized, with a high level of accuracy

-Strong time management skills, with the ability to consistently meet deadlines

-Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently while collaborating with a team

-Willing to learn, adapt, and take on new responsibilities over time



RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Manage daily Amazon Seller Central operations, including customer service, case management, account health monitoring, and resolving account or listing issues

-Perform keyword and competitor research to create and optimize high-converting Amazon listings (titles, bullet points, backend search terms) using tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or DataDive

-Create and improve Amazon listing images and Premium A+ Content using Photoshop, Canva, and AI creative tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Google AI Studio

-Create and edit high-quality product videos using Filmora, CapCut, Premiere Pro, and AI video tools such as Sora and Flow Veo

-Monitor and manage inventory levels, shipments, and stock replenishment to avoid stockouts or overstock

-Experience with Amazon PPC (campaign setup and optimization) is a strong plus



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

1. Asia working hours

2. Work-from-home setup

3. Bonus: 13th Month

4. Bonus: Year end

5. Long-term opportunity with career growth

6. Supportive and collaborative team



HOW TO APPLY:

If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please submit your applications with the following in the correct order:

1. Cover Letter

2. CV with your education and work experience in chronological order.

3. Attach your work portfolio: relevant work samples

Join our team and grow with us!

title: Outbound Sales Closer – Food / FMCG
description:
Read first:



This job is daily cold calling to takeaway shops & grocers in Australia.

If you don’t like cold calling, don’t apply.



What you do

• Call local takeaway shops & grocers

• Offer free samples

• Follow up after sample drops

• Convert the sample drop into a first full-price order

• Hours: Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (approx. 9am–5pm AEST)



Once a shop orders, the account is handed off.

You do not manage reorders or ongoing accounts.



What this is NOT

• No inbound leads

• No account management

• No marketing or strategy work



This is dial>talk >>>convert.



Pay

Commission is paid on adoption, not trials.

• AUD $1,000 monthly base

• AUD $30 one-off commission per converted account

o Commission is paid only when the shop places its first full-price order (2nd order)

o No commission on sample drops or discounted trial orders



Who should apply

• Comfortable making cold calls all day

• Proven experience hitting sales targets

• Can handle rejection

• Clear English

• Reliable and consistent



Sales experience helps. Discipline matters more.



REQUIRED TO APPLY



Applications without an answer will be ignored.



You are given a list of 150 takeaway shops to call in one working day.

How would you structure your calling day to get through the list and book trials?

(5–6 sentences max. Be practical.)

*** Attach your resume with your answer.

title: Virtual Recruiter / First Interviewer for U.S. Sales Company
description:
Arena Insurance Group is hiring a motivated Virtual Recruiter to help us screen candidates and book qualified applicants into our company overview presentations.



You will NOT be selling products.



Your job is to speak with job applicants, run a first interview, build interest, and schedule serious candidates into the next step of our hiring process.



We are looking for someone energetic, organized, confident on the phone, and strong in English.



Responsibilities:

• Respond to job applicants

• Conduct first interviews by phone or Zoom

• Ask screening questions

• Build excitement about the opportunity

• Book qualified candidates into company overview meetings

• Follow up with no-shows

• Update applicant notes in CRM / spreadsheet



Requirements:

• Strong spoken English

• Confident phone presence

• Friendly and professional

• Organized and dependable

• Comfortable interviewing people

• Recruiting or sales experience preferred



Schedule:

U.S. Eastern business hours preferred



Pay:

Hourly pay + bonuses based on interviews booked and attended.

$5 if candidate attends

$25 if candidate gets hired / starts training



To apply:



1. Send resume

2. Send short voice recording introducing yourself

3. Describe any recruiting, sales, or interview experience

title: Graphic Designer / T-Shirt Designer
description:
**Job Title:** Graphic Design VA for T-Shirt Brand (Immediate Start)



We’re hiring a **high-level graphic design VA** for ongoing t-shirt and apparel work for a motorsports / streetwear brand. We need someone **available now**, fast, reliable, and able to turn around quality designs quickly.



## What You’ll Do



* Create bold t-shirt graphics from photos, ideas, and references

* Turn vehicle images into vector / illustrated shirt designs

* Build back prints + front chest logos

* Remove backgrounds / prep print-ready files

* Create designs for black shirts with strong outlines and clean negative space

* Make revisions fast and follow direction well



## Skills Needed



* Adobe Illustrator / Photoshop or similar

* Strong t-shirt design portfolio

* Fast turnaround times

* Great communication

* Attention to detail

* Able to start immediately



## Bonus



* Automotive / truck / racing culture knowledge

* AI image tool experience

* Shopify / Printify knowledge



## Pay



Open to per design / hourly / weekly retainer for the right person.



## To Apply NOW



Send:



1. Portfolio

2. Best 3 shirt designs

 - bonus for automotive style designs

3. Availability this week

4. Typical turnaround time

5. Your rate



**We want top talent ready to work immediately. If you’re fast and good, this can become steady long-term work.**

title: Advice Paraplanner (Urgent)
description:
ADVICE STRATEGIST/PARAPLANNER

Positions Available: 1  |  Part-Time to possible Full Time

Location: Remote

Hourly Rate: AUD $10 – AUD $15 per hour

Monthly Salary: AUD $1,600 – AUD $2,400 per month 



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a highly skilled, Australian financial advice firm seeking two experienced, hard-working, and responsible self-starters to support our financial advice clients and enhance our service through:

• Implementing financial advice (Statements of Advice / SOAs)

• Assisting with client enquiries and onboarding

• Personal insurance research and strategic analysis

• Preparing advice documents, research reports, and file notes

• Managing compliance workflows and maintaining accurate client records



ABOUT PURPOSE ADVISORY

We’re a heart-led, integrative professional services firm focused on helping Australians to live their most fulfilled life. We have a team of expert professionals based in Australia and a family-like back-end team based primarily in the Philippines. We’re all about personal growth and contribution, in every aspect - persona, relational, health and financial. As part of our team, you’ll contribute to Purpose Advisory’s mission to make a meaningful difference in our client’s and partners lives.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



SOA & Advice Preparation 

• Draft Statements of Advice (SOAs) and Records of Advice (ROAs) using adviser instructions and client data

• Prepare fact-find summaries and data collection packs for new and existing clients

• Compile product comparison research (super, insurance, investments) using approved research tools



Insurance Research 

• Run personal insurance quotes and comparisons across major providers

• Prepare insurance needs analysis and replacement summaries

• Track underwriting progress and follow up on outstanding requirements



Client Onboarding 

• Prepare client authority forms, engagement letters, and onboarding packs

• Coordinate platform account openings and rollovers

• Chase outstanding documents from clients and third parties



Compliance & File Management 

• Maintain compliant client files and ensure all advice documents are correctly stored

• Prepare pre-advice and post-advice checklists for adviser review

• Assist with audit preparation and regulatory lodgement tasks

Client Communication • Respond to client enquiries with approved language and escalate where appropriate

• Prepare portfolio review packs and meeting agenda summaries

• Draft follow-up
s after adviser–client meetings



AI-Assisted Research 

• Use AI tools to synthesise product research, generate comparison tables, and draft report sections

• Leverage AI for data extraction, scenario modelling, and document summarisation

• Identify opportunities to streamline workflows using AI prompts and automation



CANDIDATE MUST HAVE

• Australian financial planning experience

• Strong compliance knowledge to support product research, data management, onboarding, and implementation tasks

• Highly skilled with using AI to complete research, synthesise information, generate reports, and solve complex problems

• Experience using Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Drive, Docs, and Sheets)

• Especially strong skills with formulas and analysis in Google Sheets / Excel

• A stable and secure internet connection suitable for full-time remote work

• A reliable computer capable of supporting daily use of cloud-based systems and collaboration tools

• Clear written communication skills and comfort working with structured templates and prompts

• A proactive, organised approach and the ability to manage competing priorities



KEY TRAITS

• Methodical and detail-oriented

• Self-managed with strong follow-through

• Clear communicator

• Collaborative and adaptable across tasks and personalities



WE OFFER

• Training and support from a passionate, purpose-driven team

• Opportunities for long-term growth and stability

• A remote, flexible work environment where your contribution is truly valued



APPLICATION PROCESS

To apply, please submit the following:

• A 2–5 minute video introducing yourself and explaining why you are the best fit for this role

• Your updated CV and LinkedIn profile link

• Names and contact details of three references (2 professional + 1 personal)

• Your answers to the case study below



  Case Study

A client
s the financial adviser requesting urgent updates on their specific holdings in a certain stock which they are concerned about and are considering selling 50% of, which we manage for them. You know the adviser is going to be held up in meetings all day and will not even see the
. You also heard the adviser mention the day before that we plan to reduce our exposure to this one specific stock in our portfolios, due to recent market fluctuations and new technology risks that have arisen.

Q1: How would you respond to the client? What would you communicate to them, and what would you do behind the scenes?

Q2: If the client asked you to action an urgent sell-down of this stock before the end of the day, how will you react?



Please apply and
 all details to: 

ONLY those who follow the instructions in how to apply will be accommodated.

title: Klaviyo Manager — Email & SMS for 35+ Ecom Brands
description:
We're hiring a Klaviyo operator who actually moves the needle. Not a button-pusher. Someone who can look at a dead flow, see what's broken, and fix it before anyone asks.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Own Klaviyo across 35+ Shopify ecom brands we manage

- Build, audit, and optimize flows: welcome, browse abandon, cart abandon, post-purchase, winback

- Write and test
 and SMS copy that actually gets opened and clicked

- Run segmentation — stop the spray-and-pray. Build audiences that convert

- Monitor deliverability, sender reputation, and inbox placement

- Report weekly on revenue-per
, list growth, and flow performance per client

- Set up new Klaviyo accounts when we onboard a client — clean install, no mess



WHO YOU ARE:

- 2+ years hands-on Klaviyo. You can talk about specific flows that made real money

- You understand ecom. You've seen what a $10K/mo brand looks like vs a $100K/mo brand

- You write clean English. Short sentences. No corporate speak

- You're data-driven. You open Klaviyo and know within 30 seconds whether the account is healthy

- You flag problems early. You don't wait for clients to notice



We have a testing process where you create
s. 



Please apply here:

title: Tracking & Connections Manager — Pixels, GTM & CAPI for Ecom
description:
WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Install, audit, and debug pixels across 35+ Shopify stores: Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Google Ads tag, GA4, Pinterest, Klaviyo, Snapchat

- Set up and maintain Google Tag Manager containers — clean dataLayer, proper triggers, nothing firing twice

- Build and manage Conversions API (CAPI) — server-side tracking for Meta, TikTok, Google

- Debug tracking issues: missing purchases, inflated conversion counts, mismatched revenue between platforms

- Make sure every new client store has 100% tracking coverage from day one

- Monitor iOS 14+ / privacy changes and adapt our stack to keep data flowing

- Document every connection for each client — never lose setup knowledge when someone leaves



WHO YOU ARE:

- 2+ years setting up pixels and tracking for ecom brands. Shopify specifically

- You know GTM cold. DataLayer, variables, triggers, tag sequencing — not a drag-and-drop user

- You've set up Meta CAPI via a server-side solution (Stape, Elevar, custom, whatever). You can explain why it matters

- You read Tag Assistant output and know what's broken without googling

- You're methodical. Tracking is detail work — one wrong event name and revenue data breaks for months



Please apply here:

title: Drafting and Estimating Administrator
description:
Remote Drafting & Estimating Administrator (Construction / Structural Steel)

Full-Time (40 hrs/week) 

Work Schedule: Must be available during Australian business hours

Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Brisbane (QLD) time

(Includes 1-hour unpaid lunch break and two paid 15-minute breaks)



About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Drafting & Estimating Administrator to provide back-end technical and administrative support within the mining and construction industry, specifically in structural steel fabrication and construction.



This role is critical in ensuring accurate technical documentation, cost estimation, compliance alignment, and overall project support.



Role Overview



This is a multi-functional technical and administrative support role. You will work closely with project managers and engineers to ensure project documentation, compliance requirements, and cost estimates are prepared accurately and on time.



1. Compliance Support

Assist with WHS documentation and compliance tracking

Maintain contractor compliance registers

Support project documentation required for mining and construction site entry. Coordinate the creation of MDR (Manufacturer’s Data Record) packages by collating fabrication drawings, ITPs, material traceability records, weld maps, NDT results, and inspection documentation, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and alignment with project and client requirements.

Track certifications, licences, and expiry dates



2. Drafting Support

Prepare and revise technical drawings using AutoCAD, Tekla, or similar drafting software

Interpret structural and fabrication drawings

Assist in producing shop drawings and as-built documentation

Maintain drawing registers and version control

Coordinate revisions based on engineering or project changes

The ability to create and work with DXF files and NC1 Files





3. Estimating Support

Assist in preparing cost estimates for structural steel projects

Perform quantity take-offs from drawings

Support material costing, labour costing, and project budgeting

Prepare tender documentation support

Maintain estimating records and pricing databases

4. Administrative, Data Entry & Filing

Maintain structured digital filing systems

Ensure accurate data entry into project management systems

Support invoice tracking and documentation collation

Assist with reporting and documentation preparation

Required Skills & Experience

Technical Skills

Proven experience in drafting or construction drafting

Experience supporting estimating in construction or fabrication projects

Strong proficiency in AutoCAD or similar CAD software

Ability to interpret engineering drawings

Experience working within mining or construction environments 

Administrative & Compliance Skills

Strong document control experience

Familiarity with construction compliance 

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Strong organisational skills

Systems & Software

Microsoft Office Suite and Microsoft 365 Suite

Project management or construction software

Cloud document management platforms

Soft Skills

Strong written communication skills

Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously

Proactive and solution-focused mindset

High level of confidentiality and professionalism





Qualifications

Degree in Drafting, Engineering, Construction Management, or a similar field (preferred)

Minimum 3+ years’ experience in structural steel/ mining/construction support roles

Demonstrated experience in drafting and estimating support

title: Project Manager — Creative + Operations
description:
We are a a growing  full service Amazon agency managing many brands on Amazon.



The Role

You'll own the full lifecycle of Amazon listing creation for our clients — from collecting product information, to developing a creative vision for how each listing should look, to managing our team through execution. You'll be the main point of contact for US-based brand owners, so strong spoken English is non-negotiable.



What You'll Do

Communicate directly with US-based clients to gather product details, images, and brand guidelines

Research competitors and develop a vision for how each listing should look and feel

Hand off creative briefs and assets to our production team and manage the work through Asana

Keep every listing project on track — follow up, unblock, escalate, and close

Build and improve workflows so the listing creation process gets better over time

Use AI tools daily to speed up research, copywriting, and creative direction



What We're Looking For



Excellent spoken and written English — you'll be on video calls with brand owners regularly

Experience creating or managing Amazon listings (A+ Content, main images, bullet points, Brand Story)

Strong project management skills — you've managed multiple projects across multiple stakeholders simultaneously

A great eye — you can look at an Amazon listing and immediately see what's working and what's not

Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, etc.) as part of your daily workflow

Experience working with remote teams, especially coordinating across time zones

Available to work US East Coast hours (or at least 4-5 hours of overlap)



Nice to Have



Experience with graphic design tools (Canva, Photoshop, Figma)

Familiarity with Amazon

Experience with keyword research tools (Helium 10, DataDive, etc.)



Compensation

Competitive monthly salary based on experience. Long-term role with growth potential.



How to Apply

Fill out our application form here:

mbers or external ad specialists

Track and improve:

description:

Web graphics

 creatives

title: Executive Assistant / Marketing & Leadgen Support
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a driven, detail-oriented full-time Virtual Assistant to support a growing consulting firm based in Ontario, Canada. This is a long-term role with real ownership, a clear path to expanding scope, and direct working relationships with the owners.

The primary focus of this role (about 60% of your time) is supporting a boutique consulting firm that specializes in financial planning and analysis (FP&A) technology implementations for financial institutions across North America. The work is varied and growing — executive support, sales and marketing coordination, client administration, and internal operations.

The remaining 40% of your time supports a small related business run by the owner’s spouse — a solo law practice in Ontario. This portion is general administrative support only. No legal experience or training is required. We will handle all legal work internally. What we need on this side is scheduling, client communication, document organization, and invoice coordination — the same administrative skills that make you strong on the consulting side, applied to a second business.

Think of this as one role supporting one household of small businesses, with consulting as the primary focus and the law practice as a lighter secondary stream. You will work directly with both owners and will not be managing two separate workloads competing for attention.



Who We Are Looking For

This role comes with a high degree of autonomy. You will not be micromanaged. That also means we need someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and delivers work that is accurate and polished the first time.

The right person for this role is:

• Genuinely driven. You take pride in your work and want to grow with the business. You care about outcomes, not just checking boxes.

• Extremely detail-oriented. You catch the small things that others miss. Typos in client-facing documents, a missing date on a form, or an incorrect figure on an invoice are the kinds of things you naturally flag.

• Professional in tone and conduct. You represent both businesses to clients, referral partners, and prospects. Your written communication reflects well on us.

• Proactive. When you see something that needs doing, you do it or raise it. You do not wait to be asked.

• Trustworthy and discreet. You will handle confidential financial, business, and client information every day.

• Comfortable supporting two related businesses. Both are small and owner-operated. The work is varied but the skills are the same across both.



Role Details

Hours 40 hours/week, Monday to Friday

Schedule Eastern Time business hours (9 AM to 5 PM ET)

Location Remote (Philippines preferred)

Role Focus Primary: consulting firm support | Secondary: general admin for a solo law practice

Compensation $8 to $12 USD/hour depending on experience

Tools All software, licenses, and tool access provided

Start Date As soon as possible



Primary Focus: Consulting Firm (60%)

Executive Assistant and Scheduling

• Manage the founder’s calendar, schedule client meetings, and resolve conflicts

• Prepare meeting agendas and distribute post-meeting notes and action items

• Inbox triage: flag urgent
s, draft routine replies for review, and archive low-priority messages

• Coordinate scheduling across multiple time zones with clients and partners

• Book travel and personal appointments as needed



Sales and Business Development

• Manage LinkedIn Sales Navigator: build saved searches, create lead lists, and flag warm prospects

• Research target prospects and gather relevant background before outreach

• Monitor LinkedIn for trigger events such as core system conversions, executive hires, and FP&A job postings

• Draft first-pass outreach messages for the founder’s review

• Follow up with prospects who have gone quiet

• Keep the sales pipeline tracker updated and accurate



Marketing and Content

• Schedule and post LinkedIn content from a provided content calendar

• Repurpose existing content (posts, articles, client case studies) into other formats

• Update the company website with new content, case studies, or team information

• Prepare and format marketing materials, one-pagers, and client-facing documents

• Maintain a competitor and market positioning reference file



Client and Project Administration

• Send invoices and follow up on outstanding payments

• Chase signatures on contracts and statements of work

• Prepare and send project status updates to clients

• Coordinate client onboarding logistics (kickoff scheduling, document collection, access setup)



Internal Operations

• Track team PTO, utilization hours, and project timelines

• Manage software subscriptions and renewal dates

• Coordinate with vendors for compliance, insurance, and managed services

• Update and maintain employee handbook, policies, and compliance documentation



Secondary Focus: Law Practice Admin Support (40%)

This portion is general administrative support for a solo law practice. No legal experience is required. All legal work and judgment is handled by the lawyer. Your role on this side is to keep the office organized, manage client-facing logistics professionally, and handle admin work so the lawyer can focus on her clients.



Scheduling and Client Communication

• Manage the lawyer’s calendar and coordinate client meetings

• Screen and route incoming calls and
s; flag urgent items

• Respond to routine client inquiries using provided templates

• Conduct initial client intake calls using a provided script and questionnaire

• Send reminders for upcoming meetings and appointments



File and Document Organization

• Open and set up new client files in the practice management system (training provided)

• Organize and index client documents and correspondence

• Populate standard templates with client information for the lawyer’s review and finalization

• Send out prepared documents for signature using Adobe or similar virtual signing tools

• Archive and close out completed files per firm procedures



Billing and Admin

• Prepare invoices from time entries for the lawyer’s review

• Send invoices to clients and follow up on outstanding accounts receivable

• Organize expense receipts and support bookkeeping

• Maintain client contact lists and referral partner databases



Marketing Support

• Schedule and post social media content from a provided calendar

• Update the firm’s website with new content as provided

• Collect and help publish client testimonials and reviews



Requirements

• 3+ years of experience as a virtual assistant, executive assistant, or in a BPO/administrative role

• Exceptional attention to detail. This is non-negotiable.

• Strong written and spoken English with a professional tone

• Self-starter who takes initiative, follows through consistently, and thrives with autonomy

• Comfortable working North American Eastern Time hours

• Experience with common business tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Teams, Adobe, and Zoom

• Ability to maintain strict confidentiality with sensitive client and business information

• Familiarity with LinkedIn (Sales Navigator experience is a plus; we will train)

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional work environment



Strongly Preferred

• Experience supporting sales or marketing activities, such as managing a CRM, researching prospects, scheduling social media content, or coordinating outreach campaigns

• Demonstrated ability to create or format polished marketing materials

• Prior experience supporting a small business owner or professional services firm



Nice to Have

• Experience with Canva or basic graphic design tools

• Experience in financial services, consulting, or B2B professional services

• Prior experience supporting a law firm or professional services practice (not required; we will train)



What You Get

• A long-term role with a growing consulting firm and a stable law practice, not a short-term gig

• All software licenses and tools provided (LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Adobe, Microsoft 365, practice management software, and others as needed)

• Direct working relationship with both business owners

• Clear path to expanding scope and responsibility as the consulting firm grows

• Paid time off and other benefits consistent with Philippines employment standards



How to Apply

Please send your resume along with a brief message (3 to 5 sentences) explaining why you are a good fit for this role. Highlight any experience supporting a small business owner, working across multiple priorities, or managing sales and marketing coordination.



Include your hourly rate expectation in USD and your availability to start. We value reliability, discretion, and a proactive attitude. If you are someone who takes ownership of tasks and follows through consistently, we would love to hear from you.

title: Creative Operations Virtual Assistant (with Client Communications focus)
description:
Creative Operations Virtual Assistant (with Client Communications focus)



About the Role

We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant who has a knack for both creative work and client communication, while confidently handling administrative tasks across three branches of the business.

The CEO and Founder, Dr. Emily Amos, leads three business branches operating independently: Dr. Emily Amos, More Than Milk, and Whole Hearted Medicine. She is a doctor, yoga and meditation teacher, and the force behind Whole Hearted Medicine.



As a VA, you will support all three branches under the guidance of the OBM. Your role is primarily execution-focused, with clear direction and context provided. You will report directly to the OBM, and tasks assigned to you are rarely last-minute, they are structured and detailed to support clarity and success.



You’ll communicate with Dr. Emily and the OBM through ClickUp (our main communication tool) via task comments and channels.



Working with us means we respect boundaries, and at the same time, we hold a high standard for ownership, communication, and reliability within your role.



Our audience includes doctors, medical professionals, and breastfeeding mothers, primarily based in Australia and New Zealand. If you’re familiar with doctor–patient confidentiality, we approach our client relationships with the same level of care and respect.



Requirements

Experience working as a VA in the healthcare or wellness industry

Experience with page design (you’ll mainly use templates in 
 with minor tweaks; full support is provided)

Strong Canva skills for creating booklets, pamphlets, and workbooks aligned with brand guidelines

Experience scheduling social media posts (Meta Business Suite or similar tools)

 newsletters or promotional
s (GHL, Kajabi, Ivorey, or similar platforms - transferable skills are welcome)

Basic video editing skills (captions, banners, music, and simple edits to enhance brand experience)

Experience creating SOPs using a clear, step-by-step approach (we provide a master guide)

Experience creating and updating reporting sheets, with the ability to understand and interpret data

Experience supporting online and in-person retreats and backend support for live online events 

Strong, thoughtful, compassionate
 communication or inbox management experience

Familiarity with ClickUp or similar project management tools

Basic familiarity with WordPress or other website builders (content updates only)

Understanding of social media marketing

Understanding of funnels 

Experience communicating with contractors or suppliers



Non-Negotiables

Availability during AEST morning overlap (7:00 AM – 10:00 AM PH time); all
s + team communication must be responded to within this window

Consistent use of Clockify for accurate time tracking across tasks

High attention to detail, including the ability to read and understand fine details

Clear communication: when raising questions or needs, you provide context and reasoning to support quick decision-making

Use of company systems only - no personal
s or tools for work-related files or communication

Attendance in monthly check-ins (within the same overlap hours)

Detailed and consistent task updates in ClickUp to ensure continuity across the team



Key Result Areas (KRAs)

First 30 Days – Onboarding & Alignment

Learn and navigate core tools (Ivorey, Canva, Meta, Kajabi, ClickUp, Clockify, etc)

Deliver tasks with guidance (page edits, Canva assets, scheduling posts/emails)

Follow brand guidelines across all outputs

Draft thoughtful and compassionate
 responses (reviewed many times before sending)

Accurately update tasks and log 100% of time in Clockify

Begin SOP documentation using the provided framework

Maintain accurate data entry in reporting sheets

Be present during AEST overlap hours (7–10 AM PH time)

Ask questions actively with clear context (expected)



First 90 Days – Ownership & Optimization

Independently execute tasks across design, scheduling,
, and basic video editing

Manage inbox with minimal supervision (clear, thoughtful, and anticipatory responses)

Create and improve SOPs for recurring tasks

Maintain reporting sheets and provide insights or recommendations

Support marketing execution across social,
, and retreat initiatives

Coordinate effectively with contractors or suppliers

Proactively identify issues and suggest solutions

Maintain clear and detailed task updates

Fully own responsibilities with minimal supervision

Expectation Shift

First 30 Days: Learning, guided execution, high volume of questions

By 90 Days: Independent, proactive, and solution-oriented



Who This Role Is For

You communicate with kindness, clarity, and thoughtfulness, especially in

You are independent and proactive, while knowing when to ask for support

You enjoy creative execution (Canva, layouts, campaigns) and have a strong eye for detail

You have a growth mindset and are open to learning and improving

You are reliable and structured, you manage your time well, provide updates, and stay calm under pressure

This role is ideal for someone who may have other clients, can time-block mornings consistently, and still has flexibility for longer tasks when needed.



Who This Role Is NOT For

You are reactive or overly dependent, needing constant direction to move forward

You struggle to follow non-negotiables (security, confidentiality, company systems)

You are inconsistent with task updates or time tracking (ClickUp, Clockify)

You resist learning new tools or ways of working

You lack ownership of your time, communication, and responsibilities

About US (First Brand):

At Whole Hearted Medicine, our mission is to create spaces of restoration, reflection, and growth for doctors. We understand the immense weight that comes with working in medicine, and we are deeply committed to holding space for our peers to reconnect with themselves through wellbeing education and trauma-informed, self-compassionate care. As a member of our team, your presence and contribution directly support this mission.



We are values-led in all we do:

Compassion – towards self, each other, and those we serve

Integrity – in our communication, systems, and decisions

Presence – cultivating awareness and intention in every interaction

Sustainability – nurturing our team as we nurture others

Innovation – evolving our offerings to meet the changing needs of our community



At Whole Hearted Medicine, our team culture is founded on the same principles that guide our client-facing work: compassion, presence, and sustainability. We recognise that our people are our most valuable resource, and we are committed to fostering a workplace that actively supports wellbeing, personal growth, and professional fulfillment.

This section outlines the shared agreements, rhythms, and support structures that help us maintain a balanced, caring, and collaborative work environment. It is designed to evolve with us as we grow and deepen our understanding of what it means to care for ourselves while serving others.



Team Meeting Rhythms

Weekly Check-Ins: 30–45 min informal meetings (online) focused on current priorities, roadblocks, and personal check-ins.

Monthly Deep Dive: 60 min structured session to reflect on progress, review upcoming initiatives, and share ideas or concerns.

Retreat or Planning Sessions: 1–2 times per year for strategic alignment and renewal (in person or virtual).

Boundaries, Rest, and Workflow Flexibility

Flexible work hours are supported and encouraged, with the understanding that tasks are completed within agreed timelines.

Communication outside work hours is not expected.
 batching and asynchronous tools are preferred.

Downtime after big events (e.g., retreat delivery or launch) is factored into planning as recovery space.

Sick leave, mental health days, and wellbeing breaks are valid and supported without question.



Compensation

Starting at $10 AUD/hour for 15-20 hours per month across the 3 brands 

Hours may increase in the coming months, especially during retreat preparation season (April–July)

A Wise account is required





A Note on Our Hiring Approach:

We are looking to build a long-term working relationship with the right person for this role. We intentionally take the time to understand your strengths and potential, which means you may initially start with a smaller number of hours and a focused set of tasks.



As we work together and see your capability in action, we continuously reassess your role, responsibilities, and compensation to ensure they reflect the value you bring.



This is a daytime role aligned with PH timezone hours, designed to support both structure and work-life balance.

If this feels aligned, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your application here. Applications close on 28 April 2026.

title: Luxury Real Estate Outreach
description:
About PHAÖRA

PHAÖRA is a luxury brand based in Boca Raton, Florida, specializing in high-end hardscape construction (pavers, pool decks, outdoor kitchens, driveways) and handcrafted crystal bird sculptures. We serve luxury homeowners and high-end real estate professionals across Palm Beach County.

Role Overview

We are hiring two cold callers to contact real estate agents, interior designers, and luxury home builders in South Florida on behalf of PHAÖRA. Your job is to introduce our services, qualify prospects, and book appointments or follow-up calls for our founder.

Responsibilities

 • Make outbound calls to real estate agents and luxury professionals using a provided script

 • Qualify leads and log all call activity in our CRM

 • Book appointments and follow-up calls for the founder

 • Report daily call counts, responses, and outcomes

 • Work closely with our VA team on outreach coordination

Requirements

 • Fluent English with clear, professional speaking voice

 • Prior cold calling or telemarketing experience (real estate preferred)

 • Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

 • Available Monday–Friday during US Eastern business hours

 • Self-motivated, persistent, and professional

 • Comfortable handling objections and rejection

Nice to Have

 • Experience calling real estate agents or luxury service clients

 • Familiarity with CRM tools (any)

 • Sales background

What We Offer

 • $3–$4/hour depending on experience

 • Consistent part-time hours

 • Performance bonuses for qualified appointments booked

 • Long-term opportunity for the right candidates

 • Direct communication with the founder

To Apply

Send your resume and a short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your cold calling experience. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Remote Web Designer (Contract) – Japanese Restaurant & Café Brand
description:
We are seeking a creative and detail-driven Web Designer to develop a visually compelling and user-friendly website for a Japanese-inspired restaurant and café concept in the United States. This role is ideal for someone who can translate a refined, minimalist brand aesthetic into a seamless digital experience that reflects the ambiance, culture, and story behind the café.



The website will serve as a key marketing and customer engagement tool, showcasing the menu, brand identity, location details, and overall experience.



Key Responsibilities

-Design and develop a modern, responsive website aligned with the café’s Japanese-inspired aesthetic (clean, minimal, elegant)

-Create visually engaging layouts that reflect the brand’s identity, tone, and guest experience

-Develop wireframes, mockups, and high-fidelity designs for approval

-Ensure optimal user experience (UX) and intuitive navigation across desktop and mobile devices

-Collaborate remotely with ownership and branding team to align website with overall concept

-Integrate essential features such as menus, contact forms, reservations, and location information

-Optimize website performance, speed, and SEO best practices

-Ensure accessibility standards and mobile responsiveness

-Coordinate with developers or build directly on platforms (e.g., Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, or similar)

-Provide guidance on hosting, domain setup, and launch process

-Offer post-launch support and minor updates as needed



Qualifications

-Minimum of 5 years of professional web design experience

-Bachelor’s degree in Web Design, Graphic Design, Digital Media, or a related field (or equivalent experience)

-Strong portfolio showcasing high-quality website designs (hospitality, lifestyle, or brand-focused sites preferred)

-Proficiency in design tools (Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or similar)

-Experience with website platforms (Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, or comparable CMS)

-Understanding of UX/UI principles, responsive design, and user behavior

-Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS (advanced coding is a plus but not required)

-Familiarity with SEO fundamentals and website performance optimization

-Ability to manage timelines and deliverables in a remote work environment

-Strong communication and presentation skills



Scope of Work / Deliverables

-Website sitemap and structure

-Wireframes and design mockups

-Fully designed responsive website (desktop + mobile)

-Integration of brand elements (typography, color palette, imagery)

-CMS setup or handoff for easy content updates

-Launch-ready website with basic SEO setup



Preferred Attributes

-Experience designing for restaurants, cafés, or hospitality brands

-Strong sense of visual storytelling and brand identity

-Ability to capture a calm, elevated, and culturally inspired aesthetic

-Detail-oriented, organized, and self-motivated

-Experience with online ordering or reservation integrations is a plus



Compensation

-Compensation will be based on experience and project scope, structured as a contract agreement.



Applicants must submit:

-Professional resume

-Portfolio of completed website projects

-Copy of diploma or proof of degree

-Three (3) professional references

title: Full-Cycle Recruiter - Home Care
description:
We are looking for a recruiter with 3 to 4 years of experience who can take full ownership of the hiring process from start to finish. This role sits at the core of our growth and directly impacts the quality of care we deliver.



You will manage the entire recruitment lifecycle. From sourcing and screening to interviewing, offer management, and onboarding. You know how to move fast without sacrificing candidate quality.



This role is heavily focused on recruiting. Scheduling support may come up when needed, but it is not the primary function. We care more about your ability to identify and close the right candidates. Any scheduling-related tasks can be learned and refined on the job.



What you’ll own:

Source and attract qualified caregivers and healthcare professionals 

Screen and interview candidates to assess skill, reliability, and fit 

Manage candidates through the full hiring funnel 

Extend offers and guide candidates through onboarding 

Maintain a strong candidate experience from first touch to day one 

Partner with internal teams to understand hiring needs and priorities 



What you bring:

3 to 4 years of recruiting experience, nice to have would be in healthcare or the home care space

Proven ability to manage full-cycle recruiting independently 

Strong communication and follow-up skills 

Ability to prioritize high-volume hiring without losing attention to detail 

A sense of urgency and ownership over hiring outcomes 



This is a high-impact role. If you take pride in building strong teams and know how to move candidates from first conversation to day one efficiently, you will do well here.

title: Ecommerce Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Strategist
description:
About Hustl

Hustl is a multi-eight-figure ecommerce holding group running a high-velocity testing and optimization program across our DTC brands. We're a lean, AI-native operation. Claude and other AI tools handle a lot of the heavy production work, so our team can focus on strategy, judgment, and taste.



The Role

This is a pure strategy and ownership role. You won't be pushing pixels, writing production code, or waiting for a PM to tell you what to test next. You are the brain behind the CRO program.



You own the roadmap end-to-end: identifying opportunities, forming hypotheses, designing tests, QA'ing the builds, analyzing results with statistical rigor, shipping winners, and compounding learnings over time. You'll work closely with our developers and designers (who execute the builds) and our
 and paid teams (so on-site strategy stays aligned with the full funnel).



We're looking for someone who has personally run dozens of tests at a serious DTC brand or CRO agency, has strong opinions about what actually moves the needle in ecommerce, and can defend those opinions with data.



What You'll Own

- The entire CRO roadmap: what gets tested, in what order, and why

- Hypothesis development grounded in analytics, session recordings, heatmaps, surveys, and user research

- Test design: variants, audience targeting, sample size, duration, primary and guardrail metrics

- Managing the split-testing tool end-to-end (we use 
)

- QA of every test before it goes live — no broken variants shipping to production

- Analyzing results with statistical rigor. No declaring winners on 80% confidence. No ignoring novelty effects

- Running retros after every test and maintaining a learnings library so we compound insights

- Project-managing design and dev on test implementation: briefs, reviews, unblocking, shipping

- Reporting CRO impact, lift, revenue, and pipeline to leadership



Must-Haves

- 2+ years running CRO programs at a DTC brand, CRO agency, or in-house ecommerce team

- You've personally designed and analyzed dozens of tests and can walk us through specific wins, losses, and learnings

- Deep fluency in at least one major testing platform (Convert, VWO, Optimizely, AB Tasty, Kameleoon). 
 experience is a strong plus

- Strong statistical literacy: you know the difference between frequentist and Bayesian, what "statistical significance" actually means, and when a test is valid vs noise

- Analytics fluency: GA4, Shopify or BigCommerce analytics, heatmaps (Hotjar, Microsoft Clarity), session recording tools

- Strong design sensibility. You can't draw it, but you know when a variant is cooked before it ships

- Highly analytical, detail-obsessed, and comfortable saying "this test isn't ready to go live"

- Strong project management instincts. You can run a roadmap, brief designers and devs, and keep shipping

- You think in hypotheses, not opinions. You say "I think this will lift conversion by 3-5?cause…" not "I feel like this looks better"



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience on Shopify or BigCommerce specifically

- Prior work on physical product / DTC (not just SaaS or lead-gen landing pages)

- Familiarity with qual research methods (user interviews, surveys, voice-of-customer)

- Copywriting or UX writing instincts

- Experience with personalization and segment-level testing

- Comfortable using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to accelerate research, hypothesis writing, or test briefs



How We Work

- Remote, async-first

- Fast-moving ecommerce operation. This is an ops role, not a research role

- You'll be measured on velocity of tests shipped and verified incremental lift over time

- Competitive compensation, weighted toward operators who can run the CRO function independently without hand-holding



How to Apply

Apply through this link --->

title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260420
description:
This is an entry-level role, where the majority of knowledge and skills will be acquired through on-the-job training, paving the way for advancement to senior positions.



Are you seeking a full-time, long-term career that offers exceptional growth potential through advancement opportunities, along with a stable income and bonus incentives? Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. If you possess self-motivation, assertiveness, and a strong work ethic, coupled with a positive outlook and the ability to excel in a fast-paced work environment, we invite you to reach out to us.



You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

The business has collaborated with a highly acclaimed loan brokerage and independent financial advisory firm, along with several other partners, all of which are fully licensed by government authorities. We offer a diversified suite of financial services and solutions with a personalized approach.



With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.



Requirement

• Strong verbal and written English skills with a neutral accent.

• Knowledge of Chinese/Mandarin, whether verbal or written, is a significant advantage.

• Exceptional talent for natural conversation.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

• Owns a competent Windows computer/laptop and android mobile phone for work

• A dependable and consistent internet connection

• Consistent and reliable power supply without frequent outages.

• A distraction-free and quiet workspace.

• Utilizing a headset equipped with Noise Cancellation technology.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Create comprehensive reports that incorporate inputs and details provided by clients.

• Create concise summaries and propose options for clients, utilizing templates for efficiency.

• Collaborate with the designated bankers to facilitate the processing of loan applications

• Schedule meetings with clients and bankers.

• Reach out to current clients as they approach the end of their loan lock-in period.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.

title: Graphic Designer (UI / Figma – Build Clean UI Asset System for YouTube)
description:
We’re building a YouTube channel focused on clear, simple cybersecurity explanations.



We are looking for a graphic designer to build a complete set of clean, minimal UI assets that will be used across all videos.



This is a one-time project to create a reusable visual system.







The Goal



Create a consistent set of UI-style assets that can be reused across multiple videos.



These assets will be handed off to a video editor who will animate them.





What You’ll Be Creating



A clean, minimal UI system including:

 •
 inbox layouts

 • Login pages

 • Simple dashboards

 • UI cards and components

 • Buttons, input fields, and basic interface elements



All assets should feel:

 • consistent

 • structured

 • easy to understand

 • visually clean







Style Requirements

 • Simplified UI (not real Gmail or real websites)

 • Clean layout with clear spacing

 • Minimal colours (off-white, grey, one accent colour)

 • No unnecessary detail or clutter

 • Designed for animation (simple, flexible elements)







Important



This is a specific type of role.



We are NOT looking for:

 • logo designers

 • branding designers

 • social media designers

 • Canva-based design



You must be comfortable with:

 • Figma (preferred)

 • building clean layouts

 • creating reusable components







What We’re Looking For

 • Basic to intermediate UI / layout design skills

 • Strong sense of spacing and alignment

 • Ability to keep designs simple and controlled

 • Ability to follow direction closely



Most importantly:

 • Reliable

 • Detail-focused

 • Open to feedback







Project Scope



This is a fixed project to build the initial asset system.



Estimated workload:

 • 8–15 hours total



There may be additional small tasks later for new variations.







Test Task (Paid)



IMPORTANT: APPLICANTS WITHOUT RELEVANT UI / LAYOUT DESIGN EXPERIENCE SHOULD NOT APPLY



We will invite a small number of shortlisted candidates to complete a small paid test task.



This will only be offered to applicants who:

 • provide relevant UI or layout examples

 • show attention to detail







Objective



You’ll be asked to create a simple, clean UI layout based on a short scenario.







Style Requirements

 • Clean layout with spacing

 • Minimal colours

 • Simple structure

 • No unnecessary elements







To Apply



Please include:

 1. Examples of UI design, web design, or layout-based work

 2. Confirmation that you use Figma (or similar tools)

 3. A short message explaining how you approach clean, minimal design







Final Note



We are building a consistent visual system that will be reused across all videos.



If your work is clean and reliable, there will be opportunities for ongoing small tasks.







Start your application with the word “SYSTEM” so we know you’ve read this properly.

This is a high-context role. You will use Clarify.ai, Clay, and other AI agents to find the right people and craft deeply personalized messages that respect the sensitivity of our historical subject matter.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation: Use AI tools to find "Affinity Leads"—people and educators who care about WWII history, social justice, and inclusive education.



Curriculum Outreach: Contact Social Studies Department Heads to pitch our books as supplemental classroom resources.



Boutique Communication: Refine AI-drafted
s to ensure they are 100?curate, professional, and empathetic.



Pipeline Management: Manage the CRM, follow up with leads, and book Zoom "Learning Sessions" for our leadership team. Experience with HubSpot is a must!



Required Skills

Exceptional Written English: You must be able to discuss historical atrocities and human rights with nuance.



AI Literacy: Proficiency with ChatGPT and lead-gen agents (Clarify, Apollo, or similar).



Sales/Development Experience: You understand how to move a lead from "cold" to "interested."

Incentives & Benefits

You'll work collaboratively with our team to transform our current fragmented approach into a unified, professional video production system.



APPLY HERE: 



What Success Looks Like:



1. Consistent Video Production & Brand Cohesion

* Produce 4-5 high-quality reels per week across multiple client accounts

* Create a cohesive brand look for each individual client while maintaining professional standards

* Deliver videos ranging from 10-90 seconds optimised for Instagram and social media platforms

* Ensure all content aligns with each client's specific brand guidelines and marketing objectives



2. Efficient Turnaround & Project Management

* Complete video editing projects within 24-72 hour turnaround time

* Use ClickUp to manage your projects and keep us updated

* Collaborate seamlessly with internal team members to replace current fragmented video creation process



3. Technical Excellence & Marketing Understanding

* Edit compelling hooks and engaging content that drives social media performance

* Utilise your preferred video editing software (CapCut business account available if needed) to deliver professional results

* Apply marketing knowledge to create videos that align with social media best practices

* Ensure technical quality meets professional standards



What We Need From You



* Advanced video editing skills with ability to optimise content for Instagram and YouTube Shorts. 

* Experience with CapCut, Adobe Suite, or other professional editing software.

* Strong understanding of brand consistency, visual design principles, and attention to detail to create polished, professional content.

* Previous experience working in marketing with understanding of social media content strategy and audience engagement.

* Excellent communication skills and ability to work effectively within a team environment using ClickUp for project management.

* Proven ability to meet tight deadlines consistently while maintaining high quality standards across multiple client projects.



Company Values



* Commitment to delivering polished, professional content that elevates our clients' brand presence and reflects our agency's quality standards.

* Consistent delivery of high-quality work within specified timeframes, ensuring smooth operations for our client services.

* Working as part of our team to transform and improve our video production process while maintaining open communication and shared success.



APPLY HERE:

title: Bookkeeper For Shopify E-commerce Business
description:
Looking for a bookkeeper who can reconcile and organize books and a timely manner for an e-commerce business.



This includes business AND personal transactions. Roughly ~1500-2000+.



The transactions date from Jan 1 2025 - Dec 31 2025



REQUIREMENTS - MUST READ:

- Experience with e-commerce (SHOPIFY) bookkeeping businesses from the US

- Speed - the project timeline is tight. I understand higher volume of transactions = longer time of completion. However, we are on a very tight timeline and can only work with someone who is able to get it done quickly with detail.

- Detail-oriented - this is very important because the volume of transactions.

- Have portfolio/testimonials that back your work. Please, no beginners.  



CONTEXT:

-  Import and reconcile 2025 transactions: business and personal

- We're based in US (California residence, Wyoming LLC)

- Softwares: Quickbooks

- Business transactions are spread out through multiple business credit cards: Amex, Chase, Slash.



BONUS:

- If you can do CPA/tax filing, that's a plus. Otherwise, we just need the bookeeping correctly reconciled.

- If the work quality is great & quick, I'll work with you ongoing. We're looking for a long-term bookeeper.



NEXT STEPS:

If you do not have experience with Shopify Ecommerce businesses in the US, please do not apply.



PRICING:

- Will be discussed in the DM's. The placeholder budget on this post is not the set amount.



Submit proposal answering the following:

1. Do you have experience working with Shopify Ecommerce businesses in the US?



2. Are you able to complete this project ASAP? This timeline will be very short. I understand that more transactions to reconcile can = longer time to complete. But we need someone who can commit fully with speed & attention to detail.



3. Must be able to start the project within next 24hrs



Thank you!

title: AI Email Response Automation Builder (Make.com + Claude API + GHL + Instantly.ai)
description:
AI
 Response Automation Builder (
 + Claude API + GHL + Instantly.ai)



We are a reputation management company with a working outbound cold
 engine. We are now building the next layer: an AI-powered reply-handling and follow-up automation system for interested prospects. This is a serious technical build. Not a beginner automation job.



If you are hired and you perform, this turns into ongoing paid work building and maintaining the rest of the business automation stack. We have a real backlog. The right person does not leave.



What You Will Build



A production-ready system that:

1. Pulls interested-prospect replies from Instantly.ai and pauses the sequence immediately

2. Fetches the full
 thread and sender persona

3. Sends thread context plus business data to Claude API with a structured system prompt

4. Parses Claude JSON output and routes: auto-send, hold in Slack for VA approval, or escalate to founder

5. Sends replies through Instantly.ai preserving thread and sender persona

6. Sends SMS follow-up 15 minutes after
 via JustCall or GHL

7. Updates GHL pipeline, tags, and 21 custom fields

8. Triggers stage-specific follow-ups when a prospect goes cold (5 follow-up sequences)

9. Slack approval workflow with approve, edit, and reject actions inside modals

10. Phased rollout from semi-automated to fully automated



Full build spec (v3, 19 pages) shared only with shortlisted candidates. It covers every module, every rule, every test. We already did the thinking. We need execution.



Project Structure



Phase 1: Fixed-price build. 50,000 PHP. Paid per milestone (40/15/15/15/15 percent across 5 milestones).



Phase 2: Paid ongoing maintenance and optimization. Separate paid arrangement. Retainer range 20,000 to 40,000 PHP per month depending on scope and volume of new work.



Phase 3: Long-term role. If you are strong, fast, reliable, and easy to work with, you become the go-to technical builder across the business. We have a real pipeline of future builds.



Bonus: 10,000 PHP for clean, on-time v1 delivery (all 5 milestones passed within the stated timeline).



Required Experience



You should have direct, production experience with most or all of these:

- 
 or n8n (multi-router, error handlers, data stores)

- APIs, webhooks, HTTP requests, JSON parsing

- Claude or Anthropic API with structured JSON output enforcement

- Instantly.ai API (reply webhooks, thread fetch, reply send)

- GoHighLevel (custom fields, pipelines, workflows, webhooks)

- Slack Block Kit, Interactivity, modals for approval flows

- SMS integrations (JustCall, Twilio, or GHL)

- CRM automation and lifecycle workflows



Who This Is For



You fit if:

- You have built multi-step systems with APIs, routers, and approval flows

- You think through edge cases before they break production

- You move fast, communicate blockers early, and do not disappear

- You can work independently from a detailed build spec



You do not fit if:

- You only know basic Zapier-level automation

- You have never worked directly with APIs, webhooks, JSON, or routing logic

- You need constant hand-holding

- You drag projects out



Speed Matters



The build spec has a 48-hour checkpoint. By end of Day 2 after access is granted, you must demo Modules 1 to 9 working. If you cannot, the project ends and you are paid only for completed milestones. This is non-negotiable.



Timeline target: 7 to 8 days for a clean v1. Tell us your realistic number.



To Apply



Do not send a generic application. Start your application with:



READY TO BUILD



Then answer every question below. Vague answers are an automatic pass.



Screening Questions



1. What is the most advanced automation system you have personally built. Walk through the workflow: inputs, routers, outputs, error handling.

2. Have you built against the Instantly.ai API directly (reply webhook, thread fetch, reply send). If yes, what broke and how did you fix it.

3. Have you used the Claude or Anthropic API inside a live production automation. How do you enforce JSON-only output and recover when the model returns malformed JSON or wraps it in markdown.

4. Have you built Slack approval workflows with approve, edit, and reject actions including modals with pre-filled content. Explain what you built.

5. How do you prevent a webhook from processing the same event twice in 
.

6. How do you handle Claude API rate limits and retries without duplicating messages.

7. The spec requires that the sender persona is extracted from the first outbound message in the thread and never switched mid-thread. How would you enforce this across reply, SMS, and follow-up modules.

8. How do you store API keys in 
 (blueprint variables, Connections vault, other) and why.

9. If you were building this project, what parts would you build first and why.

10. What part of this system is most likely to break if built poorly.

11. How would you structure this so future automations can be added without rebuilding everything.

12. Can you commit to a working demo of Modules 1 to 9 within 48 hours of getting platform access. Yes or no.

13. How fast could you realistically deliver a strong v1.

14. After launch, are you open to a paid monthly retainer plus future builds. What retainer number works for you.

15. Send 2 to 3 examples, screenshots, Looms, or short explanations of similar work.



Write the word BLUEPRINT at the very end of your application.

title: Amazon Marketplace & Inventory Operations VA (Neto Backend System)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Ecommerce Operations Virtual Assistant to support our online retail business across Amazon Seller Central and Neto (Maropost Commerce Cloud).



You will be responsible for managing day-to-day ecommerce operations including product listings, inventory updates, order processing, and general marketplace support.



We are willing to train the right candidate on Neto, so strong Amazon experience and operational thinking are more important than specific software knowledge. 



Responsibilities:

Manage Amazon Seller Central account operations

Create and update product listings (titles, descriptions, images, pricing)

Monitor and update inventory levels across systems

Process and reconcile orders between Amazon and Neto/ERP system

Assist with customer service inquiries (basic messaging/templates)

Maintain accurate SKU and product data

Help identify and resolve listing or inventory discrepancies

Support general ecommerce operations and reporting



Requirements:

Proven experience as an Amazon FBA / Amazon Seller Central VA

Strong attention to detail and accuracy (very important)

Comfortable working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

Good written English communication skills

Ability to follow SOPs and work independently

Fast learner (Neto/ERP training will be provided)



Nice to Have:

Experience with Shopify, WooCommerce, or other ecommerce platforms

Experience with inventory management systems or ERPs

Familiarity with multi-channel selling (Amazon + other platforms)

Basic understanding of SKU structures and warehouse logic

title: HVAC Estimating Assistant — Mechanical Services Quantity Takeoff
description:
Fletchair Services is a growing commercial HVAC contractor based in Sydney, Australia. We specialise in commercial mechanical services including VRV systems, chilled water systems, air handling, and associated works. We are currently tendering approximately 20 commercial projects per month and are growing fast.



The Role:

We are looking for a detail-oriented estimating assistant to handle quantity takeoffs from PDF mechanical drawings for our commercial HVAC tender projects. This is a long-term remote role working directly with the business owner.

Your primary job is to open mechanical services drawings in our cloud-based takeoff software (Groundplan), measure and count all specified items, and return a completed, organised quantity list ready for pricing. You will not be required to price the work — just measure and count accurately.



What You'll Be Doing:

Downloading and reviewing PDF mechanical drawing sets and specifications for each tender project

Using Groundplan to measure refrigerant pipe runs, chilled water pipework, condenser water pipework, and ductwork lengths

Counting equipment items including FCUs, VRV indoor and outdoor units, branch boxes, AHUs, pumps, and associated equipment

Organising takeoff quantities into clearly labelled line items by system and pipe size

Flagging any drawing discrepancies or unclear scope items for review

Completing takeoffs within agreed turnaround times (typically 1–2 business days per drawing set)



What We're Looking For:

Minimum 2 years experience doing quantity takeoff from mechanical, electrical, or hydraulic services drawings — this is essential, not optional

Experience working for a mechanical contractor, quantity surveying firm, or engineering consultancy preferred

Comfortable reading and interpreting Australian or international mechanical services drawings

Proficient in cloud-based takeoff software — Groundplan experience is a bonus but we will train the right candidate

Strong attention to detail and accurate with numbers

Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently

Strong written English for clear communication



What We Offer:

Stable long-term remote work with a growing Australian contractor

Paid trial project before any commitment from either side

Flexible hours — work during your own business hours, deliver within agreed timeframes

Direct working relationship with the business owner — no middleman, no agency

Competitive hourly rate based on experience



How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a short paragraph (5–10 sentences) describing your experience with mechanical or services quantity takeoff. Tell me specifically what types of drawings you have measured from and what software you have used. Applications without this information will not be considered.

title: Music Annotator
description:
About Beatpulse Labs



Beatpulse Labs is a fast-growing Generative AI startup focused on building advanced music intelligence systems. Our work sits at the intersection of music, data, and machine learning, powering next-generation AI models through high-quality human annotation.



We are building a global network of talented music annotators who help train and refine AI systems by analysing and labelling music content with precision and consistency.



Role Overview



As a Music Annotator, you will listen to and analyse audio tracks, applying structured annotations based on defined guidelines. Your work directly contributes to the development and improvement of AI models in the music domain.



This role requires strong attention to detail, consistency, and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced, remote environment.



Key Responsibilities



Listen to and analyse music tracks across various genres

Accurately annotate tracks based on provided guidelines and criteria

Maintain high levels of accuracy, consistency, and quality in all annotations

Meet weekly output targets and deadlines

Apply feedback to continuously improve annotation quality

Flag unclear or problematic content when necessary

Stay up to date with annotation guidelines and process updates



Performance Expectations



Consistent delivery of assigned annotation volume per week

High accuracy and adherence to guidelines

Reliable turnaround times

Ability to maintain quality at scale



Requirements



Strong interest in music (formal training is advantageous but not required)

Excellent attention to detail and pattern recognition

Ability to follow structured guidelines precisely

Strong time management and self-discipline

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Reliable internet connection and access to a computer



Preferred Qualifications



Background in music, audio production, or music theory

Experience with data annotation, tagging, or content analysis

Familiarity with different music genres and structures

title: Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand

About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

You Need

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses
