title: Senior Email Marketing Strategist
description:
About Hustl

Hustl is a multi-eight-figure ecommerce holding group. We're a lean, AI-native operation. Claude and other AI tools do a lot of the heavy production work, so our team is focused on strategy, judgment, and taste.



The Role

We're looking for a senior
 strategist who has personally driven 7+ figures in
 revenue at a serious DTC brand or agency. You won't be hand-designing every
 or writing every line of copy. Claude will. Your job is to be the brain: strategy, segmentation, flows, offer architecture, testing roadmap, and knowing what "good" looks like so you can direct the AI to produce it.



This is a rare role where deep
 expertise gets multiplied by AI. If you've been frustrated watching juniors take forever to build flows you could have architected in an hour, this is built for you.



What You'll Own

- Full lifecycle strategy: welcome, abandonment, post-purchase, win-back, VIP, replenishment

- Campaign calendar and promotional strategy tied to our merchandising and launch schedule

- Segmentation architecture, list hygiene, deliverability, and sender reputation

- A/B and multivariate test roadmap across subject lines, offers, creative, and send timing

- Directing Claude to produce copy, design briefs, and flow logic. You review, edit, and raise the bar

- Reporting, forecasting, and attributing
's contribution to revenue

- Working closely with the CRO, paid, and merchandising teams so
 is aligned with site-wide strategy



Must-Haves

- 2+ years in
 marketing with at least one senior or lead role at a DTC brand or top-tier agency

- Demonstrable 7-figure (ideally 8-figure)
 revenue track record. You can walk us through the accounts, programs, and numbers

- Deep experience with an
 Service Provider (ESP). An ESP is the platform you use to send, automate, and track
 campaigns. Examples: Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Attentive, Sendlane, 
, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign. Klaviyo expertise strongly preferred

- Strong grasp of deliverability, DMARC, SPF, DKIM, warming, and inbox placement

- Sharp design sensibility. You can look at an
 and tell us exactly why it will or won't convert

- Analytical: comfortable with cohort analysis, LTV, and attribution

- Comfortable working with AI tools daily. Ideally already using Claude, ChatGPT, or similar to accelerate your workflow

- You're opinionated, fast, and prefer shipping to perfecting



Nice-to-Haves

- Ecommerce / DTC physical product experience (not SaaS-only)

- Seasonal or holiday-driven category experience

- SMS strategy experience

- Basic HTML or Liquid literacy for when something needs a tweak Claude can't handle

- Prior experience building prompt libraries or AI SOPs



How We Work

- Remote, async-first

- We use Claude heavily. You'll be expected to lean into it, not resist it

- We move fast. Perfect is the enemy of shipped

- Compensation is competitive and weighted toward senior operators who can own an entire function



How to Apply

Apply through -->

title: Lead Generation
description:
Lead Generation Specialist



DMN8 Partners | Remote | Monday–Thursday, 10:00 AM–8:00 PM EST



DMN8 Partners is looking for a motivated, detail-oriented, and highly professional Remote Virtual Lead Generation Specialist to help create sales opportunities for our digital marketing agency.



DMN8 Partners helps local service businesses get more leads through Google Maps ranking, local SEO, website optimization, Google Ads, social media, AI tools, and lead generation systems. We work with contractors, home service companies, professional service businesses, and local business owners who want to grow.



This role is ideal for someone who is confident communicating in perfect written and spoken English, enjoys outreach, follows processes well, and wants to be rewarded for helping generate real sales opportunities.



Position Overview



As a Remote Virtual Lead Generation Specialist, your main responsibility will be to contact prospective business owners through text messages and
s with the goal of creating interest in DMN8 Partners’ services and scheduling appointments for our sales representative.



You will be given lists, scripts, offers, and outreach instructions. Your job is to communicate clearly, follow up consistently, track responses, and help turn conversations into scheduled sales appointments.



The target goal for this role is to schedule 2–3 qualified appointments per day.



Responsibilities



Your daily responsibilities will include:



Sending outbound text messages to prospective business owners

Sending outbound
s using approved templates and messaging

Following up with leads who reply or show interest

Answering basic questions using provided scripts and resources

Qualifying prospects based on simple criteria

Scheduling interested prospects for appointments with the sales representative

Updating lead status, notes, and appointment details accurately

Keeping communication professional, friendly, and clear

Working consistently during the required shift

Following DMN8 Partners’ outreach process and messaging guidelines

Requirements



The right person for this role must have:



Excellent written English

Excellent spoken English

Strong attention to detail

Reliable internet connection

Ability to work independently without constant supervision

Strong follow-up skills

Ability to stay organized while managing multiple conversations

Confidence communicating with business owners

A positive attitude and willingness to learn

Previous experience in appointment setting, lead generation, cold outreach, sales support, or virtual assistant work is preferred

Work Schedule



This is a remote position, but the schedule is required.



Required hours:

Monday–Thursday

10:00 AM–8:00 PM EST



Applicants must be available to work the full schedule consistently.



Compensation



Pay: $4/hour

Bonus: Additional bonus paid for completed appointments



A completed appointment means the prospect shows up for the scheduled meeting with the sales representative.



This role is a great fit for someone who wants stable weekly hours with the opportunity to earn more based on performance.



Who We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is dependable, coachable, and driven by results.



You do not need to be a marketing expert, but you do need to be a strong communicator who can follow instructions, stay consistent, and represent DMN8 Partners professionally.



The best person for this role will be someone who understands that success in lead generation comes from daily activity, fast follow-up, clear communication, and strong organization.



How to Apply



To be considered for this position, please send the following:



Your resume

A written acknowledgement that you understand and can work the required hours:

Monday–Thursday, 10:00 AM–8:00 PM EST

A written acknowledgement that you understand the pay:

$4/hour plus bonus for completed appointments

A 30-second to 1-minute video explaining why you should be chosen for this role



Applications that do not include all four items may not be considered.

 open rates, click-through rates, response rates, call outcomes) and suggest improvements

Performance Metrics

s sent

 campaign performance (open rates, click-through rates, conversions)

Work Environment

title: Inbound Sales & Customer Support (Phone + Text)
description:
Hi, my name is Chase — I’m the owner of 31 Auto Detailing Co., a growing mobile auto detailing company based in New Jersey.



We’re currently looking for a long-term Inbound Sales & Customer Support Representative to handle incoming calls and messages from new customers.



This is a key role in our company, as you will be the first point of contact for clients and responsible for helping convert inquiries into booked appointments.



Here’s what we’re looking for:



* Strong, clear English (must be very easy to understand on the phone)

* Confident, natural communication (not robotic or overly scripted)

* Experience with phone calls, sales, or customer service

* Comfortable following a proven sales process and handling basic objections

* Organized and able to manage scheduling and customer information

* Friendly, professional, and reliable



Responsibilities include:



* Answering inbound calls from customers

* Responding to text messages and inquiries

* Booking appointments and collecting customer details

* Managing our schedule and keeping appointments organized

* Updating customer information in our CRM

* Following our sales process to help convert leads into booked jobs



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with our company.



To be considered, please send:



1. A short voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself

2. Your experience with phone calls or sales

3. How you would respond to a customer who says: “I need to think about it”

4. Your availability (days/hours)



Looking forward to hearing from you.



— Chase

title: VA/email marketing/video editor/familiar with Warriorplus/jvzoo
description:

I'm a solo digital entrepreneur running an affiliate marketing and digital product business. I promote offers on WarriorPlus and JVZoo to an
 list and an online Skool community. I need a reliable full-time VA who can own the entire
 process end-to-end — from writing to sending — plus basic video editing and general business support, all within a fast-moving, AI-assisted workflow.



What you'll be doing



Drafting promotional
s using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) following specific style and formatting rules — then scheduling and sending them via AWeber and Wired Plus



Managing lists, campaigns, and broadcasts inside AWeber — including segmentation and deliverability basics



Researching and tracking affiliate offers and product launches on WarriorPlus and JVZoo



Basic video editing — trimming, cutting, captions, simple polish (no motion graphics needed)



Helping manage and post inside a Skool community



General admin and business support tasks as needed



What you need to know / have



AWeber — comfortable navigating lists, campaigns, broadcasts, and actually hitting send



AI tools — actively uses Claude or ChatGPT for content generation, not just aware of them



WarriorPlus / JVZoo — understands how affiliate offers, launches, and commissions work on these platforms



Basic video editing — can trim, cut, add captions using CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar



Strong written English —
s need to be clean and natural-sounding



Self-starter — I'm a solo operator. I need someone who takes initiative and doesn't need hand-holding



Nice to have



Experience with Skool communities



Familiarity with MunchEye or similar product launch calendars



Experience with digital product businesses or info marketing



How to apply



Send a short message (no essays) telling me: which tools from this list you've actually used, one example of AI-assisted work you've done, and your availability. Applications that just say "I am interested" will be ignored.

description:

title: Researcher & Outline writer for Youtube videos
description:
We are looking for a researcher and outline writer to help us create YouTube tutorial videos.



Your role will be to research a topic and create a structured outline that our production team can use to record the video. You will not write full scripts — only clear, well-structured outlines that guide the video.



Our channel focuses on tutorials and explainer videos about AI tools, app building, and no-code software.



Responsibilities:



- Research the assigned topic

- Identify the most important concepts, steps, and explanations

- Create a clear, structured video outline

- Organize the outline so a creator can easily record the video from it



Trial Task (Required):

To apply, please complete the following short sample task.

Create a video outline for the topic:



“Ollama Full Tutorial for Beginners 2026: How to Use Ollama”



Your outline should be structured similarly to this example:







We are looking for:



- Clear structure

- Logical flow

- Good research

- Sections that make sense for a tutorial video



Important:



- This is not a script writing job

- We only need structured outlines

- The outline should be detailed enough that someone can easily create a video from it



How to Apply



Submit:



- Your outline for the trial topic

- A short message about your experience with research or YouTube content

- Applicants with the best outline samples will be hired.

title: Motion Designer / Video Editor for YouTube (UI-Based Explainer Videos – Clean SaaS Style)
description:
We’re building a YouTube channel focused on clear, simple cybersecurity explanations.



This is not a typical editing role.



We are looking for someone who can combine:

- motion design (UI-based animations)

- video editing (pacing, flow, timing)



into clean, minimal, high-retention videos.



---



The Style



Think:

- simplified UI 
 inbox, login pages, dashboards)

- smooth cursor movements and interactions

- minimal, clean visuals (SaaS-style)

- calm, controlled pacing (not flashy, not fast cuts)



This is NOT:

- YouTube vlogs

- gaming edits

- 
 edits

- heavy effects or transitions



---



What You’ll Be Doing



- Animating simple UI flows 
 ? click ? login ? outcome)

- Editing videos for clarity and pacing

- Following structured scene breakdowns (we provide scripts + scene plans)

- Keeping visuals clean, simple, and easy to follow



---



Important



This is a specific type of role.



We are NOT looking for:

- basic video editors with no motion design

- Canva-style editors

- people who rely on templates or flashy effects



You must be comfortable creating or animating:

- UI interfaces

- cursor interactions

- clean, minimal motion sequences



---



What We’re Looking For



- Solid motion design fundamentals (not necessarily perfect)

- Good sense of pacing and timing

- Ability to follow instructions closely

- Attention to detail



Most importantly:

- Reliable

- Responsive

- Coach-able



We care more about:

someone who can improve and follow a system



than:

someone who thinks they already know everything



---



Work Setup



- Ongoing work (weekly videos)

- Clear scripts and scene direction provided

- Expect consistent work if a good fit



---



Test Task (Paid)



IMPORTANT: APPLICANTS WITHOUT RELEVANT MOTION DESIGN / UI EXPLAINER EXPERIENCE SHOULD NOT APPLY



We will invite a small number of shortlisted candidates to complete a paid test task.



This will only be offered to applicants who:

- provide relevant examples of UI-based motion design or explainer work  

- show strong attention to detail in their application  



---



Objective



You’ll be creating a short 15–25 second sequence based on a simple scenario.



---



Style Requirements



- Simplified UI (do not use real Gmail or real websites)  

- Clean layout with spacing  

- Minimal colours (off-white, grey, one accent colour)  

- Smooth cursor movement  

- Calm pacing (not fast, not flashy)  



---



To Apply



Please include:



1. Examples of UI-based motion design or explainer work  

2. Any YouTube videos you’ve edited (if applicable)  

3. A short message explaining:

   - how you approach clean, minimal design

   - how you handle instructions and feedback



---



Final Note



We are building something long-term.



If you are:

- reliable

- willing to improve

- and can follow direction well



this can turn into consistent ongoing work.



---



Start your application with the word “STRUCTURE” so we know you’ve read this properly.

title: Claude Design Email Designer needed
description:
Hello there!



We are a growing
 Marketing Agency with multiple e-commerce clients looking for an enthusiastic and professional
 Graphic Designer who specializes in designing with Claude Design.



Claude Design is Anthropic's brand new AI design product that just launched two days ago on April 17, 2026, powered by Claude Opus 4.7. We are building our entire
 design workflow around it.



This role is part-time where you will work alongside our current team of 30+.



PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU ARE AN
 DESIGNER WITH HANDS-ON CLAUDE DESIGN EXPERIENCE.



We are looking for a skilled
 designer, but more importantly, a real team player who gets tasks done on time, hits deadlines, and can work weekdays and weekends.



All training videos as well as account access will be provided for your Claude account. 



We are looking for someone who consistently completes their tasks on time.



These designs will be made for individual
 sends across our client roster.



Our
 designs are typically short in length and will be based on each client's website branding. All text copy will be provided for the design.



 



The Workflow You'll Be Running:



1. Generate HTML
 templates in Claude Design based on the client's branding and the copy we provide



2. Export the HTML and upload it into Figma using an HTML-to-Figma conversion tool



3. Upscale the imported design inside Figma to our 1000px
 template spec



4. Finalize the design in Figma with final tweaks, polish, and brand-specific touches before handoff



 



Here are examples of what you'll be expected to make:




/drive/folders/1xSeK67_uBRNsUTy8u_IZSb-fbHDZHvZU?usp=drive_link

- Minimum 1-year
 designing experience



- Hands-on experience with Claude Design (the new Anthropic product released April 17, 2026)



- Proficient in Figma, including importing HTML and finalizing layouts



- Familiarity with HTML-to-Figma conversion tools



- Proficient in English



- Proficient with Slack for team communication



- Able to work weekdays and weekends



 



Your tasks as a designer will include:



1. Generate HTML
 templates in Claude Design using the client's website branding and our provided copy



2. Convert the HTML into Figma and upscale to our 1000px
 spec



3. Finalize each design in Figma with polish and brand-accurate tweaks



4. Design up to 5
s per day (the majority will be for one client so the workflow will be very efficient)



5. Communicate with your team in Slack



6. Complete all tasks daily before 3 PM PH time



 



We ask that you answer the questions below to help us get to know you.



Questions:

 marketing before?



2. Do you have examples of your work we can review? Please link
 designs only (no other design work).

4. Which HTML-to-Figma tool(s) have you used, and how do you typically clean up the import?



5. How long would it take you to produce a finalized
 graphic if all copy and images are provided?



6. Can you work mornings (8 AM to 12 PM PH time)?



7. Can you commit to at least 6 months if selected?



8. Can you work at least 2 hours on weekends?



9. Have you worked for an
 Marketing agency or e-commerce team before?



10. Are you experienced using Figma for
 designs at 1000px width?



 



We are growing quickly over the next few months and this position will offer opportunities for incentive-based pay and salary growth. After 3 months there will be a salary increase.



If you provide examples, please make sure they are relevant to what this job describes 
 designs only).

You must be able to work at least 20 hrs/week (including weekends).

title: Social Media Marketer (Competitive Salary)
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION:



(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)

title: Photo editing expert / E-commerce
description:
Job Title: Photo Editor (E-commerce)



About Us

We are a fast-growing e-commerce business managing multiple online stores. Our focus is on high-quality visuals that convert, and we are looking for a skilled Photo Editor to help us scale our content production.



Role Overview

As a Photo Editor, you will be responsible for editing product images quickly and efficiently, ensuring they meet our brand standards and are optimized for conversion. You will work closely with our team to maintain a consistent visual identity across all our webshops.



Key Responsibilities



* Edit and retouch product images for multiple e-commerce stores

* Remove backgrounds, adjust colors, lighting, and sharpness

* Ensure all images are web-optimized and consistent in style

* Deliver high-quality edits within tight deadlines

* Proactively identify improvements in image quality and workflow

* Collaborate with the team to maintain brand consistency



Requirements



* Proven experience as a Photo Editor (preferably in e-commerce)

* Strong skills in tools like Photoshop, Lightroom, or similar software

* Ability to work fast without compromising quality

* Proactive mindset — you don’t wait for instructions, you take initiative

* Strong attention to detail

* Reliable and able to meet deadlines consistently

title: Amazon sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?

title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
Video Editor (Freelance | Long-Term | Remote)

Work From Home | Philippines Preferred



SALARY

$800 – $1,100 USD/month (based on experience)

Paid monthly • Month-to-Month Contract



ABOUT US

We’re Media Grinders, a US-based video editing team working with clients in:



Fitness

Lifestyle

Online brands

Independent creators

Agencies

Specialty and Niche Markets



We are NOT:



A content farm

A rush-job agency



We focus on:



Clean edits

Strong pacing

Content that keeps people watching



We’re building a small, reliable team — not a large roster of freelancers.



IMPORTANT (PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING)



This is an independent contractor role. You will have control over how you complete your work, using your own equipment and workflow, while meeting agreed deadlines and communication expectations.



Stable, ongoing monthly workload

Paid monthly in USD

Continued based on performance and workload



This is NOT:



A one-time project

A casual side gig

A role for juggling multiple demanding clients



We are looking for someone who wants consistency and long-term collaboration.



HOW HIRING WORKS



Step 1 — Paid Trial 



You complete real editing tasks

We evaluate quality and communication

You are paid regardless of outcome



Step 2 — Month-to-Month Contract



Ongoing monthly work

No long-term lock-in on either side

Renewed based on performance and workflow



We keep people who deliver. Simple as that.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



-Edit mid- to long-form videos (10–30 min) for digital platforms (YouTube, brand content, and other formats) with clean structure, strong pacing, and retention-focused editing

-Create short-form content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts) that is platform-native and engaging — not just trimmed clips

-Adapt edits based on platform, format, and audience — understanding that what works on YouTube is not the same as what works on short-form or branded content

-Add subtitles, music, and basic motion graphics that enhance the edit (not distract from it)

-Perform light color correction and audio cleanup to deliver polished, client-ready exports

-Follow creative direction while also making smart editorial decisions when needed

-Manage your time and hit deadlines consistently without follow-ups

-Communicate clearly and professionally in English



We also use AI tools, including 



Opus Clip

Galaxy.ai



You should be open to learning and using these tools.



REQUIREMENTS



Must-Have:



3+ years experience editing for YouTube and social media

Strong English communication

DaVinci Resolve (preferred) - Will consider PPro-

Portfolio with relevant work (REQUIRED — no portfolio = no review)

Reliable internet and editing setup

Ability to coordinate during some US Eastern Time overlap hours



Nice to Have:



Basic After Effects or Fusion skills-  Ability to create titles and basic graphics/ modify templates

Experience with AI editing tools

Fitness or lifestyle content experience

Experience working with US-based clients



WHAT YOU GET



Monthly USD pay (reliable and predictable)

Consistent workload

No need to find clients

Long-term opportunity without rigid contracts

Supportive, organized team

Increased pay as we grow



HOW TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph AND send an
 to:





Subject line:

I Want to be your Editor — [Your Name]



Include:



Short introduction

2–3 portfolio links

Software and hardware

Time zone and availability

Expected monthly rate

Answer this question: Is Pluto a planet?



APPLICATIONS WILL BE IGNORED IF:



No portfolio

Copy-paste responses

Missing the Pluto question



FINAL NOTE



We’re a small but serious team.



We value:



Reliability

Communication

Editors who take ownership



This role is structured as an independent contractor engagement and does not create an employer-employee relationship.



This is a month-to-month contractor role with long-term intent. We’re building something steady with the right people.

Klerk is a B2B SaaS that offers a unified platform to manage all events travel logistics to ensure success and ROI.

Klerk distinguishes itself with a highly personalized approach, offering tailored recommendations and detailed planning tools that empower event organizers and businesses to make informed decisions effortlessly. This bespoke guidance, combined with all-encompassing platform, not only streamlines the event and travel logistics management process but also significantly boosts profitability. Our innovative software supports a freemium model, providing unparalleled value and compelling competitors to rethink their strategies in the face of Klerk's advanced, customer-centric solutions. This strategic focus ensures that every user benefits from customized, actionable insights that simplify complexity and drive success.

As a Senior Backend Engineer at Klerk, you’ll play a key role in architecting and scaling the systems that power our platform. You’ll work closely with our founders contributing to a product that already supports thousands of businesses and is on track to surpass millions in GMV. This is your chance to join an early-stage team where your code directly impacts revenue, customer experience, and company growth.

Excellent problem-solving abilities and attention to detail

Experience with database and cloud

Basic knowledge of Front-End Development

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field

Technology, Information and Internet

Full-time

title: Marketing and Content manager (Full-Time|Night Shift to start, then flexible
description:
About the Role

We are a top-producing luxury real estate team based in Texas and we are looking for a focused, results-driven Marketing & Content Coordinator to help us grow our online presence and generate more buyer and seller leads. This is not a general social media role. We want someone who thinks strategically about growth, takes ownership of our digital footprint, and works directly with the owner to build and elevate her personal and business brand.



You will be trained on all existing systems by our current marketing manager and then take full ownership of the role. From day one the goal is clear: grow our audience, increase engagement, and help us attract more clients through every platform we operate on.



Our entire staff is based in the Philippines and we run a collaborative, connected team on Zoom every day. You will be a real part of that. We also invest heavily in AI training for every person on staff. If you are curious about where AI is going and want to grow in that space, you will love it here.



This role includes managing both a personal and business Instagram account. You will be posting a mix of personal and professional content, so an eye for lifestyle branding alongside real estate content is important.

Before applying, we encourage you to spend a few minutes on our Instagram accounts so you understand the brand and tone you will be working with. 
 @alexisweigandrealestate.

This role starts at 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST, Monday through Friday. After your first 90 days, we offer flexible scheduling for tea
mbers who have proven themselves. We want you working when you are most productive.



What You Will Do

Work directly with the owner to grow her personal brand and overall online presence

Create, schedule, and post content across Google Business Profile, LinkedIn,
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube with a focus on generating buyer and seller leads

Manage both a personal and business Instagram account, posting a mix of personal and professional content

Maintain an organized content calendar across all platforms

Edit Reels, Stories, TikToks, and YouTube videos natively inside each platform

Design graphics, marketing materials, and print-ready magazine ads using Canva

Stay proactive about trends and consistently bring growth-focused ideas to the table

Use Claude AI and other AI tools as part of your daily content workflow. Training is provided.

Show up on Zoom daily as part of a connected, collaborative team



Requirements

Previous real estate marketing experience is ideal and will be prioritized

Proven experience managing Google Business Profile, LinkedIn,
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. Links to past accounts required.

Comfortable scheduling and publishing content natively across all platforms

Proficient editing inside Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

Proficient in Canva. Portfolio of past work required.

Excited to use and learn AI tools at a high level

Familiar with Google Workspace and Slack

Strong written English. Captions and copy are a core part of this role.

Reliable, fast internet. Power outages cannot be a recurring issue.

40 hours per week availability, Monday through Friday



Compensation and Schedule

Salary: $12,000 USD per year (performance based bonuses eligible after 6 months)

Full-time, 40 hours per week, Monday through Friday

Starting hours: 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Central Standard Time

**Flexible scheduling available after your first 90 days

Result-oriented bonus opportunities available after your first 6 months

Remote, work from home



How to Apply

Submit all four of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

A Loom or YouTube video (5 to 8 minutes) answering the screening questions below

Links to social media accounts you have managed (GBP, LinkedIn,
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)

A portfolio or examples of past content and design work

A photo of yourself and your workstation



Video Screening Questions

Record a Loom or YouTube video answering each question in order. Look into your camera and speak clearly. No screening call is booked without a video.

Introduce yourself. Tell us who you are, where you live, and what you enjoy outside of work.

What are your core values and what matters most to you in your work?

Rate your spoken and written English on a scale of 1 to 10. Be honest.

Walk us through your social media and marketing experience. Which platforms have you managed, what was your strategy for growing an audience, and what did your best performing week look like?

Have you worked in real estate marketing before? If yes, tell us about that experience specifically. If not, tell us what draws you to this industry.

Show us or describe a piece of content you created that drove real results. What was the goal, what did you create, and what happened?

How comfortable are you editing natively inside Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube? Walk us through your process.

How are you currently using AI tools in your work? If you have not started yet, tell us how excited you are to learn.

What is most important to you in your next role and where do you want to be in one year and five years?

Anything else you want us to know about you or your work? Any questions for us?

title: Social Media Video Editor & VA (TikTok / Reels / Content Posting)
description:
We are building a new recruitment platform called Vocatio and are looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to manage our social media content.



Your role is to take raw videos and turn them into posted, tracked content across multiple platforms.



This is a structured, repeatable role with clear systems.



Responsibilities:



- Edit short-form videos (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)

- Add subtitles and clean cuts

- Keep videos fast-paced and engaging

- Add simple graphics or overlays where useful (not overdone)



- Post and schedule content across:

  TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts,



- Prepare (not post):

  LinkedIn content (video + caption draft)



- Select videos for
 group sharing and write share text



- Track performance in a Google Sheet

- Send a simple weekly report



- You must be able to work quickly and consistently each week. Speed and reliability are more important than perfection.



Content Style:



- Fast-paced, TikTok-style videos

- Clean, simple edits

- Speaker always the main focus

- Visuals support, not dominate

- Do not overuse effects or make videos feel like ads. Content should feel natural and native to TikTok.



Audience is mainly 16–30 year old job seekers.



Requirements:



- Experience editing TikTok / Reels content (ESSENTIAL)

- Experience using CapCut or similar editing software

- Strong understanding of TikTok-style content

- Good English (written and spoken)

- Attention to detail

- Reliable and consistent



To apply:



Please include:

1. Examples of videos you have edited

2. What software you use

3. Your availability



Start your application with the word: Vocatio



Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a short test edit.



Starting at 10 hours/week, increasing as needed

title: AI API Short Video Generator
description:
Job Title: Developer Needed for Simple AI B-Roll Video Generator Tool



I am looking for a software developer to build a simple internal tool that automates the generation of short B-roll video clips using AI.



The main goal is to save time.

Right now, generating multiple B-roll clips for each video takes a lot of manual work.



What the tool should do (simple version)



I want a basic tool where I can:



Paste in a list of prompts (text box)

Select whether to generate using:

Grok Imagine

Gemini Veo

or both



Then the system should:



Send prompts to the selected API(s)

Wait for the videos to generate (simple polling is fine)

Display results in a list

Allow me to download the videos

Example prompts

Create a video of the electron transport chain gradients

Create a video of red blood cells flowing through capillaries and releasing oxygen in the presence of CO2



Each prompt will generate short clips (5–10 seconds).



Output format



Files should be named like:



1-Grok

1-VEO

2-Grok

2-VEO

Important



This is a simple MVP tool, not a complex platform.



Clean and reliable is more important than design

No need for advanced UI

No need for complex systems

Requirements

Experience working with APIs

Experience building simple web tools or scripts

Ability to handle basic async requests (polling is fine)

Strong attention to detail

To apply, please include:

Examples of similar tools or API work you’ve done

Your preferred tech stack

A short explanation of how you would build this

Estimated hours to complete

Estimated total cost

Include the word CO2 in your application

Goal of this project



The goal is to reduce the time it takes to generate multiple B-roll clips for each video.

title: Customer Service / Dispatcher Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a reliable, organized, and responsive Customer Service / Dispatcher Virtual Assistant to help manage daily order flow, driver coordination, customer onboarding, and support.



This role is ideal for someone who is calm under pressure, communicates clearly, pays close attention to detail, and can handle both customer service and dispatch-related responsibilities efficiently. The position supports the kind of order handling, support queue management, customer updates, and driver coordination described in your operating plan.



Main Responsibilities



Order and Dispatch Management



Monitor incoming orders placed through
 messenger

Go to the Order Tab on the admin dashboard when a new order comes in

Confirm payment automatically

Assign an available driver to each order based on:

driver availability

driver inventory

delivery distance

Coordinate with drivers regarding ETAs, active deliveries, and delivery issues

Communicate with drivers or management through Signal messenger



Customer Service



Answer customer questions regarding deliveries, orders, delays, and general support

Communicate with customers about order updates, delays, and problems

Resolve customer-driver issues professionally and efficiently

If a driver cannot reach a customer, contact the customer directly and relay any needed information back to the driver

Answer all support tickets and keep conversations organized



Customer Onboarding



Onboard new customers through Signal

Ask for or input customer information as needed

Provide customers with invite codes so they can access the ordering system



Operational Support



Add new pickup locations if needed

Keep support notes organized and updated

Escalate urgent issues to management when necessary



Ideal Candidate



Has experience in customer service, dispatch, operations, or virtual assistance

Communicates clearly and professionally

Is highly organized and detail-oriented

Can multitask and stay calm in fast-moving situations

Is comfortable working with customers, drivers, and management

Can follow workflows carefully and consistently

Experience using
, Signal, admin dashboards, or support systems is a plus



Skills Required



Strong written communication

Good judgment and problem-solving skills

Attention to detail

Strong organization

Ability to manage multiple conversations at once

Professional and respectful communication

Reliability and responsiveness



Short Job Post Version



Hiring: Customer Service / Dispatcher VA



We are looking for a dependable Customer Service / Dispatcher Virtual Assistant to help manage customer communication, dispatch, onboarding, and support.



Responsibilities include:



Monitoring incoming
 orders

Going to the order tab in the admin dashboard

Confirming payments automatically

Assigning available drivers based on availability, inventory, and distance

Communicating with drivers and management via Signal

Onboarding customers through Signal and providing invite codes

Answering customer questions about deliveries and orders

Handling support tickets and keeping notes organized

Relaying messages between drivers and customers when needed

Adding pickup locations if necessary

Escalating urgent issues to management



The ideal candidate is organized, responsive, professional, and able to handle both customer service and dispatch tasks smoothly.

title: Virtual Sales Closer / B2B Sales Rep (US Market) – Base + Commission
description:
We are a marketing agency looking for a remote sales rep / closer to speak with local business owners in the USA.



You do not need previous sales experience, but it is preferred. The most important things for this role are:

- great/excellent English

- confidence speaking with prospects

- comfort being on camera

- professionalism and coachability



This role has a lot of room for growth. You will receive training and support to improve your sales skills, perform at a higher level, and increase your earnings over time. This is a very lucrative opportunity for the right person.



You will be talking to business owners about our marketing services, so you must be able to communicate clearly, build trust, and speak confidently on video calls.



Responsibilities:

- Speak with leads and prospects from US local businesses

- Join discovery and sales calls

- Communicate our marketing services clearly and confidently

- Build rapport with prospects

- Answer questions and handle objections professionally

- Follow up with leads when needed

- Keep notes and pipeline updated in the CRM

- Work hours that overlap with the US market



Must-have requirements:

- Great/excellent spoken and written English

- Must have a webcam

- Must be comfortable speaking on video calls with prospects

- Professional communication skills

- Reliable internet connection

- Quiet workspace for calls

- Organized, dependable, and coachable



Preferred:

- Sales experience

- B2B experience

- Experience speaking with US customers

- Familiarity with marketing or agency services

- Familiarity with CRMs like HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Pipedrive, or similar



Compensation:

- Base pay + commission

- OTE: $2,000–$3,000/month

- Pay depends on communication skills, experience, and performance



How to apply:

To apply, you must do ALL of the following:



1. Submit a voice recording or video recording that is 60 seconds maximum (Video submission preferred)

3. In the recording, include the following:

   - Todays Date (Recording date)

   - your past experience

   - why you feel you are a good fit for this role

4. Include the word "Orange" in your application titles submission

5. Include your whatsapp contact



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



This is not a customer service or general VA role. This is a sales role for someone who is confident speaking live with prospects and helping move conversations toward a sale.



We are looking for someone who is professional, hungry, confident, and great at communicating. If you have excellent English and are comfortable on camera, we would like to hear from you.

title: Instagram Growth Manager — Personal Brand (Consultant)
description:
About the role

I run a consulting business in Sydney called Kaizen Collective. We help service business owners build client acquisition systems that actually work. My personal 
 ~20K followers) is the primary top-of-funnel for the business.

I'm looking for someone to own the growth of that account end-to-end.

This is not just a video editing role. This is a strategy and execution role. 

You will be responsible for what gets posted, when, and why. 

You will write captions. You will concept Reels & edit them.

You will track what works and do more of it. You will tell me when my ideas are bad.

If you're waiting for instructions before you can do anything, this isn't the job.



What you'll own

1. Instagram content calendar and posting schedule 

2. Reel concepts, hooks, captions, and scripts (I film the content, you direct it)

3. Carousel design and copy

4. Video editing & thumbnail creation

5. Stories strategy and daily execution

6. Comment and DM triage (not sales conversations, just engagement and surfacing leads)

7. Daily & Weekly performance reporting — what worked, what didn't, what we're changing

8. Trend research and adaptation for my niche (service business owners, not general business)



What you don't own

- Paid ads (we have a media buyer)



You focus on one thing: growing my personal brand Instagram.



You're the right fit if

1. You've personally grown a social account from zero to something meaningful

2. You've managed at least one personal brand account end-to-end

3. You can write in someone else's voice without making them sound generic

4. You understand the difference between "content that gets views" and "content that gets clients"

5. You have taste

6. You ask questions when unclear instead of guessing



You're the wrong fit if

1. You're a video editor looking for your next gig

2. You need a full brief before you can start working

3. You've never posted anything you've personally concepted

4. You think AI can replace strategy

5. You're juggling five other clients and this is a side hustle



Rate

$800-$1,500 AUD/month based on experience and scope. Paid weekly. 

30-day paid trial before ongoing engagement is confirmed.





You apply via the questions below

a) Shortlisted applicants get a paid test task ($50 AUD, flat rate, whether hired or not)

b) The final two or three get a 30-min video interview, offer and 30-day paid trial



How to apply

Read my Instagram 

Then reply with:

1. Three Reels you've personally concepted (not just edited). Include the link and one line on why each worked.

2. An account you've actively grown. Share the handle, where it started, where it got to, and the timeframe.

3. Looking 
 right now, what's the single thing you'd change first and why? Be specific. Generic answers will be ignored.

4. What's your current availability and what other work are you doing right now?(ti's fine to have a job but be honest)

5. Your monthly rate in AUD.



Filters: Applications that will be ignored:



1. Anything that starts with "I am passionate about social media"

2. Cover letters that don't reference my actual account

3. Copy-paste responses clearly written by ChatGPT or Claude

4. Anyone who lists "content creation" as a skill without evidence of it

5. Anyone who doesn't answer all five questions



I read every application personally. Make it easy for me to say yes.

title: Recruitment Consultant
description:
We are hiring Executive Recruitment Consultant

AU Property & Construction | Philippines-Based | Part-Time ? Full-Time Pathway

*** Must have prior recruitment experience within the Australian property & construction market ***





Paul Group Recruitment is a respected Australian search firm specialising in permanent placements across executive and senior leadership roles within the property and construction sector.



We are seeking a highly experienced Executive Recruitment Consultant to lead end-to-end search engagements, partnering closely with the Director on strategic, high-impact placements.



This opportunity offers a flexible engagement model, initially part-time with a defined pathway to full-time, designed for a seasoned recruiter who values quality delivery over volume.



With a client base, warm mandates, and advanced AI-driven systems, this role is structured to enable you to focus on execution, relationship management, and successful placements.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Key Responsibilities

Lead full-cycle executive search engagements from briefing through to placement

Conduct high-calibre interviews and assessments via phone and Microsoft Teams

Manage and deliver on retained and contingent search assignments (no cold BD required)

Build and maintain trusted relationships with senior-level candidates and clients

Leverage LinkedIn, Boolean search, and advanced sourcing methodologies to identify top talent

Utilise AI tools and internal systems to optimise workflow efficiency

Partner directly with the Director on critical and strategic hires



_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Essential Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Demonstrated success in Australian property & construction recruitment

Strong executive search capability with proven placement outcomes

Advanced LinkedIn sourcing and Boolean search expertise

Exceptional communication skills with a polished, professional presence

Profile We’re Looking For

5+ years’ experience in end-to-end recruitment, with a focus on executive or senior-level roles

Deep understanding of permanent recruitment and search methodologies

Ability to operate autonomously and manage stakeholder relationships at a senior level

Commercially aware, detail-oriented, and results-driven

Comfortable working with modern recruitment technologies, AI tools, and automation

Philippines-based with availability to work Australian business hours

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



What You Can Expect

Flexible engagement: part-time commencement with a clear pathway to full-time

Competitive compensation aligned with experience (open salary structure)

Performance-based growth and long-term progression opportunities

Access to a strong pipeline of warm client mandates

Dedicated VA/Admin support to streamline delivery

Advanced recruitment tools and AI systems

Direct mentorship and collaboration with an experienced Director



_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Application Process (Mandatory Requirement)

To be considered, please submit a Loom or video recording covering:



A brief professional introduction

Your experience within AU property & construction recruitment

What differentiates you as an executive recruiter

Your salary expectations and availability



Applications submitted WITHOUT a LOOM video will not be progressed.

title: Instagram Direct Message (DM) Manager- Numerology / Coaching Brand (English Fluent, US Audience)
description:
The Leelu Method is a fast-growing numerology compatibility coaching brand with 100,000+ followers on our verified Instagram 
 viral Reels regularly reach 7-23 MILLION views, and we help English-speaking women across the US, UK, and Australia decode their relationships using our proprietary numerological system.



This is NOT generic numerology — we use proprietary formulas based on forensic behavioral science, tested on 11,500+ profiles in corporate settings. 



Our founder, Lily Chystofat, is an established relationship expert.



We have a complete sales funnel in place: free compatibility quiz, free heartbreak protocol, free masterclass, $3.33 compatibility report, $697 core program, $1,700 guided track, and $4,997 VIP 1-on-1 coaching.



We're hiring TWO Instagram DM Managers to help us convert the massive incoming DM volume from our viral content into qualified leads and sales.



What You'll Do



Our ManyChat bot handles the first automated message when users type keywords like "MATCH" or "HEAL" in our Instagram DMs. YOUR job begins after the bot's message:



• Continue the conversation personally once the user replies to the automated message

• Give short, valuable numerology insights based on birth dates they share (we'll train you on our system over 2 weeks)

• Guide users toward the right product: free quiz, $3.33 compatibility report, free masterclass, $697 program, or 1-on-1 VIP consult

• Log every conversation in our CRM (Google Sheets)

• Nurture warm leads with follow-up messages over 3-14 days

• Escalate hot leads (VIP/coaching inquiries) to Lily directly

• Handle skeptics, objections, and emotionally-charged conversations with empathy and professionalism

• Meet our response-time standards: under 15 minutes during peak hours, under 1 hour otherwise



This is NOT a sales-pushy role. Our approach is educational, warm, and authoritative. Think "knowledgeable friend giving you a heads-up" — not "used car salesman."



???? Volume Expectations



•
DM conversations per day (normal volume)

• Peak days after viral Reels:
+ conversations

• 25-30 hours per week per manager

• Shifts cover different US time zones (we're hiring one early shift, one late shift)



???? Who We're Looking For



REQUIRED:

? Near-native written English (our audience is US/UK/AU — zero grammar mistakes)

? 2+ years of social media DM management, customer service, or similar client-facing work

? High emotional intelligence — our audience writes about breakups, infidelity, divorce, and loneliness. You must be able to hold space with warmth and without being clinical or pushy.

? Reliable daily availability (consistency is non-negotiable)

? Fast learner — our numerology system takes about 2 weeks of training to grasp the basics

? Comfortable with sales conversations, but in a consultative (not pushy) way

? Google Sheets proficiency for CRM tracking

? Stable internet and reliable work setup



PREFERRED (nice to have, not required):

? Experience in coaching, spiritual, dating, or relationship niches

? Basic numerology, astrology, or personal development knowledge

? ManyChat or similar chatbot platform experience

? Sales funnel understanding

? Previous work with US/UK-based clients



NOT A FIT IF:

? You copy-paste template replies without personalization

? You use pushy "BUY NOW!!!" sales language

? You're judgmental about women's relationship choices or lifestyles

? Your written English has grammar or clarity issues

? You need constant supervision — we need self-starters



We are hiring TWO managers to cover US time zones. Please specify your preferred shift in your application:



• SHIFT A: 9:00 PM - 5:00 AM Philippines Time (= 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM US Eastern)

• SHIFT B: 1:00 AM - 9:00 AM Philippines Time (= 1:00 PM - 9:00 PM US Eastern)



Weekend coverage: alternating weekends between the two managers.



???? How to Apply



Applications without ALL of the following will be ignored:



1) Your full name, timezone, and preferred shift (A or B)



2) A 3-5 sentence intro about yourself — written in the tone you would use when responding to a customer DM



3) Your relevant experience (DM management, customer service, coaching industry, or sales)



4) Complete this TEST SCENARIO:



A woman sends us this DM:



"I'm born on March 12. My husband is August 4. We've been married 11 years but something feels off lately. Is it him or me?"



Our automated bot has already sent her the free quiz link. She opened it but didn't complete it. She's now writing to you directly.



Write YOUR reply (2-3 messages max), showing how you would:

- Validate her feelings first

- Give her a small, intriguing insight (even made-up based on general numerology knowledge — we'll train you on our actual system)

- Move her toward either the $3.33 Compatibility Report OR the free masterclass



DO NOT write things like: "Please take the quiz first" or "Buy the report now!"



DO write: something warm, authoritative, and insightful that makes her feel seen.



5) Your expected monthly rate



6) How many hours per week you can commit to



7) Your start date availability



---



We will review all applications within 72 hours. Qualified candidates will be invited to a 15-minute video interview. The role begins with 2 weeks of paid training — we invest in our team from day one.

title: Social Media Manager — US Mortgage & Real Estate Brand | Remote
description:
COMPANY: One of the Fastest-Growing Mortgage Brokers in the United States

LOCATION: 100% Remote — Work from Home 

SCHEDULE: Full-Time | Monday–Friday | Flexible hours with PST overlap (minimum 4 hours overlap required)

COMPENSATION: PHP 30,000–55,000/month depending on experience

TYPE: Full-Time | Long-Term | Immediate Start



---



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are one of the fastest-growing mortgage brokerage brands in the United States. We close home loans, HELOCs, DSCR investor loans, refinances, and non-QM products across California, Texas, Florida, and beyond. Our brand is built online — Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
 — and we are growing fast.



We are hiring a dedicated Social Media Manager to own our digital presence, grow our audience, and turn followers into leads and referral partners. This is not a task execution role. This is a brand-building role.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will be the person behind our social media accounts every single day. You plan the content calendar, write the captions, schedule the posts, engage with our community, respond to DMs and comments, track what's working, and bring new ideas to the table every week.



You won't be editing videos — we have a dedicated video editor for that. Your job is everything else: strategy, posting, engagement, growth, and reporting.



If you've built or managed social media accounts that actually grew — not just existed — this role is for you.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Content & Posting

- Manage and maintain a weekly content calendar across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
 etc.

- Schedule and publish all content consistently — no missed posting days

- Write captions that sound human, relatable, and on-brand — not corporate or AI-generated

- Coordinate with our video editor to receive finished content and get it posted on time

- Repurpose content across platforms to maximize every piece

- Source and use trending audio, hooks, and formats to boost reach



Community & Engagement

- Respond to every comment and DM within 24 hours — faster on high-priority accounts

- Actively engage with our audience, referral partners, and target community daily

- Build genuine relationships in the mortgage, real estate, and personal finance space online

- Monitor brand mentions and conversations and flag anything important



Growth & Strategy

- Research trending topics and content angles in mortgage, real estate, and personal finance

- Pitch 3–5 new content ideas weekly with hooks, formats, and goals

- Identify collaboration and partnership opportunities with realtors, investors, and influencers

- Help grow our following organically — real people, real engagement, no bots



Reporting & Analytics

- Track weekly metrics: follower growth, reach, engagement rate, profile visits, DM volume

- Provide a clean weekly report with wins, learnings, and recommendations

- Identify what content is performing and double down — identify what isn't and adjust



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

- 2+ years of social media management experience — you have real accounts with real growth to show

- Strong English writing skills — captions, DMs, and responses must be natural and professional

- Deep understanding of Instagram and TikTok algorithms and what drives organic growth

- Organized and consistent — you don't miss posting days or let DMs go unread

- Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

- Familiar with scheduling tools (GHL, Buffer, Meta Business Suite, or similar)

- Reliable internet connection with a backup plan



Strong Bonus:

- Experience in mortgage, real estate, finance, or any regulated industry

- Experience growing a brand account from low following to 10K+

- Canva skills for creating simple graphics, story templates, or captions

- Basic understanding of Meta Ads or paid social (not required but a huge plus)

- Bilingual English/Spanish — our audience is heavily CA/TX/FL

- Experience managing YouTube community tab, Shorts, or long-form scheduling



Not a Fit If:

- You've only managed personal accounts or accounts with no measurable growth

- You need daily instructions on what to post

- Your writing sounds robotic, templated, or AI-generated

- You can't commit to consistent daily engagement

- You have no backup for internet or power outages



---



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



Starting Pay: PHP 30,000–55,000/month based on experience

Performance Bonus: Monthly bonus tied to follower growth and engagement milestones

Paid Training: Full onboarding on our brand voice, tone, and content strategy

Long-Term Role: We are not looking for a contractor — we want someone who grows with us

Career Growth: Top performer path to Head of Marketing as the brand scales

Flexible Schedule: Results matter more than hours — we trust you to manage your time

PTO after probationary period

US Holidays + select Philippine holidays observed



---



WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT



- You work directly with the founder — your ideas get heard and acted on immediately

- Real brand, real loan volume, real audience to build

- No agency middleman — direct hire, stable position

- Mortgage and real estate content is one of the fastest-growing niches on social media right now

- You'll have a dedicated video editor already on the team — your job is strategy and execution, not production

- Ground floor opportunity on a team scaling toward $10M+/month in loan volume

- Your work directly helps American families buy homes and build wealth — it means something



---



HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Complete our short personality and work style assessment (5–8 minutes). This is required for all applicants — no exceptions:



???? 
lify.app



Step 2:
 your application to 



Subject line: Social Media Manager PH — [Your Name]



In your
 include:

- Links to 2–3 social media accounts you've managed (Instagram, TikTok,
, or YouTube)

- Your biggest win — one account or campaign you're most proud of and what results you drove

- A brief answer (3–5 sentences) to this question: Looking at our niche (mortgage/real estate in the US), what content angle or strategy would you focus on first to grow our Instagram and why?

- Your available start date

- Your internet speed and backup solution for outages



Applications without the personality assessment and account examples will not be reviewed.



---



IMPORTANT NOTES



- This is a direct hire — no agency, no recruiter fees.

- We require a minimum 4-hour daily overlap with PST business hours. Please only apply if you can commit to this.

- We are building something real and long-term. We want someone who wants to grow with us — not just fill a role.

- A short Loom or video introduction showing us your personality is a strong bonus.

title: Loan Officer Assistant (LOA) — US Mortgage | Remote
description:
JOB TITLE: Loan Officer Assistant (LOA) — US Mortgage | Remote

COMPANY: One of the Fastest-Growing Mortgage Brokers in the United States

LOCATION: 100% Remote — Work from Home (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Full-Time | Monday–Friday | 8:00 AM–5:00 PM PST (11:00 PM–8:00 AM PHT)

COMPENSATION: PHP 35,000–65,000/month depending on experience

TYPE: Full-Time | Long-Term | Immediate Start



---



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are one of the fastest-growing mortgage brokerage brands in the United States. We specialize in home loans, refinancing, HELOC, DSCR investor loans, and non-traditional mortgage products across multiple US states. Our team is lean, fast-moving, and performance-driven — and we are building our remote operations team in the Philippines.



This is a ground-floor opportunity to grow with a US-based mortgage company that is scaling aggressively. We invest in our people, provide full training, and promote from within.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Loan Officer Assistant (LOA) to support our US-based loan officers from application through closing. You will be the backbone of our loan pipeline — keeping files moving, borrowers informed, and our team focused on closing deals.



This is not a call center job. This is a professional operations role with real career growth potential in the US mortgage industry.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Collect, organize, and verify borrower documents (income, assets, ID, disclosures)

- Follow up with borrowers via phone,
, and text to keep files moving

- Build clean, complete loan files ready for processing and submission

- Update CRM (Go High Level) with accurate notes and task management

- Coordinate with processors, title companies, escrow officers, and clients

- Assist with AUS findings and pre-qualification workflows (training provided)

- Prepare files for submission and assist with clearing basic loan conditions

- Deliver a professional, high-touch borrower experience on every file

- Attend daily team check-ins via Zoom or Google Meet



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

- Excellent written and spoken English — you will communicate directly with US clients

- Strong attention to detail — errors in mortgage files cost time and money

- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple files simultaneously

- Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet work environment

- Self-managed, proactive, and able to work independently

- Comfortable with CRM tools, Google Workspace, and cloud-based systems



Strong Bonus (not required — we will train the right person):

- Previous experience in US mortgage processing, LOA, or loan support

- Knowledge of US mortgage terms (DTI, LTV, AUS, DU/LP, underwriting)

- Experience with Go High Level, Encompass, or similar LOS/CRM platforms

- Background in banking, lending, real estate, or financial services

- Experience working with US-based clients or companies



Not a Fit If:

- You struggle with fast-paced, deadline-driven environments

- You need constant supervision and direction

- You are not comfortable communicating with US clients by phone or

- You have frequent internet or power outages with no backup solution



---



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



Starting Pay: PHP 35,000–65,000/month based on experience

Performance Bonuses: Additional bonuses tied to closed loan volume

Paid Training: Full onboarding and US mortgage industry training provided

Equipment Allowance: Available for long-term hires

Career Growth: Top performers promoted to Senior LOA, Loan Processor, or Jr. Loan Officer track

PTO: Paid time off after probationary period

US Holidays observed + select Philippine holidays

Long-term, stable position — we don't hire and rotate



---



WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT



- Work directly with a US mortgage team — real exposure, real experience

- No middleman agency — you are hired directly by the company

- Clear performance metrics — you always know how you're doing

- Grow into a specialist in one of the most in-demand financial fields in the US

- Be part of a team scaling toward $10M+/month in loan volume

- Your work directly impacts real American families buying homes and building wealth



---



HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Complete our short personality and work style assessment (5–8 minutes). This is required — it helps us understand how you think and work before we schedule an interview:



???? 
lify.app



Step 2: Send your resume/CV to 



Subject line: LOA Application PH — [Your Name]



Step 3: In the body of your
, include:

- Your English proficiency level (conversational / professional / native-level)

- A 30 second video of yourself speaking on why we should pick you for this position

- Any mortgage or financial services experience you have

- Your internet speed and backup plan for outages

- Your available start date



Applications submitted without completing the personality assessment will not be reviewed.



We respond to all complete applications within 48–72 hours.



---



IMPORTANT NOTES



- This role requires PST business hours (night shift in the Philippines). Please only apply if you are comfortable with and committed to this schedule.

- This is a direct hire — no agency fees, no third-party recruiters.

- We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not just fill a contract.

- A short video or voice introduction is a bonus but not required.

title: Bookkeeping & Transaction Recording Specialist
description:
Bookkeeping & Transaction Recording Specialist



FastXE | Remote | Full-Time



FastXE is a new neobank specialising in foreign exchange services for private clients. We are looking for a detail-oriented bookkeeper to join our growing operations team.



What You’ll Be Doing



You will monitor multiple private client group chats, extract transaction details from conversations, and accurately record all activity into Odoo. Transactions vary in format and are often non-standard, so you’ll need to stay organised, think on your feet, and keep on top of multiple moving parts simultaneously.



Requirements

 • Strong Excel skills

 • Solid understanding of currency conversion and the ability to calculate fees accurately

 • Excellent written English — you must be able to read and interpret client messages quickly and without errors

 • Ability to work independently and manage a fast-moving workload

 • QuickBooks experience is a plus



Who You Are



You are methodical, reliable, and comfortable working with financial data that doesn’t always come neatly packaged. You can synthesise information from multiple sources quickly and flag anything that doesn’t add up.

title: TikTok Community & Affiliate Manager
description:
We are looking for an Community & Affiliate Manager to join one of our client pod teams. You will be responsible for building creator and affiliate pipelines, running outreach campaigns, managing 
 communities, negotiating and managing paid creators, maintaining performance data, and helping drive TikTok Shop revenue for brand clients.



This is a hands-on, metrics-driven role that spans creator outreach, relationship management, community operations, and affiliate program execution. You will be reporting to the senior account strategist.



What You Will Do



Creator Sourcing & Outreach



Build and maintain lists of high-potential creators using platform tools and internal databases

Research and identify creators that align with client brand values, target audiences, and content style

Evaluate creators against both quantitative performance metrics and qualitative brand-fit criteria

Source creators from our internal creator network of 24,000+ creators

Launch and manage cold outreach campaigns via
 and direct message

Research competitor programs and TikTok Shop trends to inform creator targeting





Paid Creator Management



Manage paid creator budgets and ensure full allocation on schedule

Build outreach lists, launch recruitment campaigns, and negotiate rates and deliverables with creators

Creator retention, activation rates, and content output

Community engagement: messages sent, tickets resolved, challenges launched

title: Long Form YouTube Video Editor with Creative and Graphic Design Skills
description:
