We are looking for someone who can think creatively, bring ideas to the table, and help make each video more engaging and dynamic.



What You Will Be Doing:

• Edit long form YouTube videos ranging from 10 to 30 or more minutes while matching the style of our current content

• Add engaging elements such as motion graphics, text overlays, transitions, sound effects, and visual storytelling enhancements

• Incorporate graphic design elements that elevate the overall production quality

• Improve pacing, retention, and viewer engagement throughout the video

• Collaborate by suggesting creative ideas to make videos more interesting and impactful



What We Are Looking For:

• Proven experience editing long form YouTube content

• Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, and audience retention

• Graphic design skills with the ability to create custom visuals and effects

title: Branded Dropshipping Site Developer
description:
Branded Dropshipping Store Builder - Ongoing Team Role



I run multiple ecommerce brands and I'm looking for a skilled freelancer to join my team on an ongoing basis to build branded dropshipping stores from scratch.



This is NOT a one-off gig. I launch new products regularly and I need someone I can hand a product, a niche, and a theme to — and get back a fully branded, high-converting Shopify store ready for paid traffic within days.



What You'll Be Doing:



• Taking a product and a pre-existing premium Shopify theme and turning it into a branded store that looks like a real DTC brand — not a generic dropshipping site

• Creating product pages that convert — hero sections, ingredient/feature breakdowns, social proof, pricing, FAQ, guarantees, trust badges

• Using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Cursor, v0, etc.) to build stores fast and at a high standard

• Working across health, wellness, pet, Niche Brands and supplement niches primarily

• Building stores that compete with brands like Grüns, Primal Queen, Paw Print Lab, AG1 — premium feel, clean design, conversion-focused



Must-Have Skills:



• Shopify theme customisation — can take any premium theme (Shrine Pro, Prestige, Impulse, etc.) and make it look like a $50k custom build

• Strong design eye — understands visual hierarchy, CTA placement, mobile-first, conversion design

• AI tools proficiency — actively uses AI for copy, design, images, code, and speed. I want someone who's building with AI daily, not someone who's "open to learning it"

• Subscription app setup (Recharge, Loop, Seal)

• App integrations (Klaviyo, Meta Pixel, reviews apps, payment apps)

• Fast turnaround — can deliver a complete branded store in 7–14 days



Good-To-Have Skills (Big Plus):



• VSL (Video Sales Letter) creation — can script, edit, or produce VSLs for product pages and funnels

• Funnel building — can create offer landing pages, pre-landers, advertorials, and listicles (on Shopify, GemPages, Replo, Zipify, Funnelish, or similar)

• Direct response copywriting — understands hooks, pain-agitation-solution, objection handling

•
/Meta ad creative design — static ads, carousel ads

• Basic video editing for UGC-style ad content



How This Works:



• I give you a product, niche, competitor references, and a theme

• You build the full branded store + funnel pages if needed

• We iterate with 2–3 rounds of revisions

• Rinse and repeat for the next product



I'm looking for someone who can become my go-to store builder. Not someone I have to micromanage — someone who sees a brand like Grüns and knows exactly how to reverse-engineer that level of quality on Shopify.



To Apply:



1. 3–5 branded Shopify stores you've built (must look like real brands, not generic dropshipping sites)

2. Which AI tools do you use daily and how?

3. Can you create VSLs? If so, share an example.

4. Can you build funnels / offer LPs / advertorials? If so, share an example.

5. Your availability (hours per week) and rate (per store or hourly)

6. Turnaround time for a typical single-product branded store



This is a long-term position for the right person. If you're fast, use AI, have a strong design eye, and can build stores that don't look like dropshipping sites, I want to hear from you.



Dhruv

title: KILLER FINANCE VA ONLY
description:
We are not posting this to build a pipeline. We are hiring right now — today. If you need a week to "transition," close this tab.



Last week we hired someone who couldn't start immediately and couldn't meet our standards. That slot is now open again BUT FOR ONLY ONE PERSON. We don't make the same mistake twice.



---



Who we are



A fast-moving DTC brand doing real volume. Our numbers matter. Our records need to be clean, fast, and untouchable. We operate at a high standard and we expect the same from everyone on the team.



---



What you will own



- Vendor invoice management and reconciliation

- Logistics and operational cost tracking

- Purchase orders and payment record-keeping

- Financial reports that are accurate the first time, every time



---



What we require — non-negotiable



- You can start TODAY. NOT TOMORROW. BUT TODAY.

- You have real, verifiable finance or bookkeeping VA experience — not "I've handled expenses before"

- Excel is second nature to you. We will not teach you formulas.

- You respond fast, work independently, and do not need to be chased

- You take ownership when something is off — you find it before we do



---



What will get your application deleted immediately



- Sending a generic cover letter

- Not answering the screening question below

- Saying you need 2+ weeks before you can start

- Listing "fast learner" as a skill



---



Rate: State your expected hourly rate. Applications without a rate will not be reviewed.



---



Screening question — required, no exceptions:



Walk us through a specific time you caught a financial discrepancy or error before it became a bigger problem. What was it, how did you find it, and what did you do? Vague answers will be disqualified.



---



To apply: Send your response to the screening question, your rate, and a brief summary of your most relevant experience. That's it. No fluff needed.



We are moving fast. So should you.

title: Agency Internal Operating Software — Build Brief
description:
=Overview 

We're a growing marketing agency operating across WhatsApp, Google Sheets, and ClickUp. We need a developer to build an internal web app that puts everything in one place — client performance, payments, sales activity, and team tasks.



The App Has 5 Modules

CEO Dashboard — Business snapshot on login. Client health overview (color coded), revenue projections, sales activity, and auto-generated alerts

Client Hub — Full client profiles with revenue, payment history, performance metrics, weekly updates, and communication logs

Finance & Payments — Payment tracker per client, expense log, contractor payments, monthly revenue projections

Team & Tasks — Daily standup log, task board by client, weekly reports

/password login with role-based access (3 roles)

title: Virtual Sales & Admin Representative
description:
About the Role



We’re a residential window cleaning company in Oahu looking for a reliable, organized, phone?savvy virtual assistant to handle sales, customer service, and admin. Must work 9:00 am – 5:00 pm, Monday–Friday (Hawaii–Aleutian Standard Time)



Your mission is simple: Keep the schedule full, customers happy, and the back office organized.



---



Key Responsibilities



1. Sales (Primary)



- Respond quickly to new lead inquiries by phone, text, and
.  

- Provide basic job estimates using our pricing tools and guidelines.  

- Work the sales pipelines daily: move leads through each stage and prevent drop?offs.  

- Run 7?day follow?up cadences with open estimates and unbooked leads.  

- Pull jobs forward to fill gaps in the schedule by contacting flexible customers.  

- Update CRM notes daily so every lead and client has clear, current information.





2. Customer Service (CSR)



- Monitor and protect customer satisfaction on every job.  

- Handle complaints professionally; document issues and schedule go backs (touch ups)  

- Support technicians with on?job issues (access, notes, rescheduling).  

- Send and manage booking confirmations and reminders.  

- Answer service questions about pricing, services, and availability.  

- Process reschedules/cancellations, and backfill those openings from the pipeline.  

- Monitor review responses and follow up with happy customers to get Google reviews.  

- Identify and plan simple upsell opportunities (add?on services, maintenance plans).



3. Admin



- Track bonuses and commissions based on completed jobs and upsells.  

- Send internal updates and reminders to the field team (special instructions, notes).  

- Plan and document yard sign routes for technicians.  

- Process refunds once approved and record them properly.  

- Set up and track client payment plans when needed.  

- Monitor overdue invoices and run polite follow?up calls/texts; log all attempts.



---



Requirements



- 1+ year experience in phone?based customer service, inside sales, or appointment setting (home services a plus).  

- Strong spoken and written English; confident on the phone and in text/email.  

- Comfortable making and receiving a high volume of calls and messages.  

- Highly organized, detail?oriented, and able to follow scripts and checklists.  

- Experience with CRM (HouseCall Pro) and basic office tools 
, calendars, spreadsheets).  

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace.  

- Able to work 9:00 am – 5:00 pm, Monday–Friday, Hawaii–Aleutian Standard Time consistently.



---



Compensation



- Hourly base pay starting at $7/hour with growth opportunities 

- Performance bonuses tied to:  

  - revenue sold and collected

  - service plans sold



You’ll get training on our systems, scripts, and processes. Your work will directly impact how quickly we grow and how well we serve our customers.

• Can take a premium theme and make it look like a $50k custom build — not a template

, reviews, tracking pixels

I need someone who can look at brands like Grüns (

title: Video Editor needed for regular, ongoing work
description:
THE COMPANY

Avalon Creative Group is a dynamic and innovative company headquartered in the heart of the San Francisco Bay Area and Silicon Valley in California. We specialize in the creation of captivating and immersive content for corporate clients, offering comprehensive content design, production, and creative services. Working with Avalon Creative Group presents an exciting opportunity for individuals seeking to collaborate with renowned brands, while also offering a continuous learning environment that fosters personal and professional growth.



JOB DESCRIPTION

Avalon Creative Group is seeking a talented and experienced video editor and 3D animator based in the Philippines to work with us as an independent contractor. Our work includes videos to inspire audiences at corporate events, on-demand marketing webinars, internal corporate training and sales enablement, product demos, highlight reels, social media ads, interviews, customer testimonials and more.



Our goal is to establish a long term working relationship with a creative, reliable and ambitious video professional. After successfully completing an initial trial period, the right person will become an integral member of our creative team on a full-time contract basis.



RESPONSIBILITIES

> Edit high quality videos from a variety of sources, including single-camera, multi-camera, stock footage, AI generated video, graphic elements, music, sound effects, etc.

> Effectively and efficiently generate video footage and elements using the latest AI tools

> Manage accuracy and correction of color and audio

> Understand and apply corporate branding and style guidelines and templates (MOGRTs)

> Manage, organize and backup video assets and deliverables, including raw footage, graphics, sound files, stock footage, projects, files, etc.

> Adhere to budgeted time constraints while incorporating client feedback and changes through multiple rounds of review and revisions

> Contribute to and consistently apply efficient workflow processes and standards (SOPs)

> Document guidelines and process details for tea
mbers and clients

> Pursue ongoing professional development and skill enhancements



REQUIRED SKILLS

> Having a proven track record of punctuality, reliability and professionalism is essential

> Excellent attention to detail and adeptness at managing multiple concurrent projects is required

> Strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment

> English fluency (written and spoken) along with excellent communication skills are essential

> You must be based in the Philippines with fast, reliable internet access and a robust computer

> You must have a quiet workspace where you can work without distractions and join Zoom calls



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

> At least 2 years of professional experience and proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite, specifically Premiere Pro and After Effects

> Bonus if you have experience or proficiency with using 3D software like Blender, Cinema4D, or anything similar.

> You must have strong creative skills and a portfolio of work that demonstrates your passion and experience with video editing and motion graphics

>> Your portfolio must include examples of the type of work listed in the job description section

> Expertise in video editing fundamentals and techniques, including pacing, storytelling, and continuity

> Knowledge of different video formats and codecs for various delivery platforms



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

> 5 years of experience with Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects.

> At least 2 years of experience and proficiency with Blender or Cinema 4D.

> Proficiency in color correction, audio editing, and mastering

> Familiarity with team communication and project management tools like Smartsheet, Slack, ClickUp, or similar platforms

> Familiarity or experience using AI post-production tools

> Strong understanding of visual composition, typography, and graphic design principles

> Completion of training and/or certifications in key software used

> Knowledge of social media platforms and video encoding specifications for each platform



COMPENSATION & ENGAGEMENT

> Compensation rate for full-time, independent contractor will be $1000 - $1300 USD per month

> Ten paid holidays and ten days of accrued paid time off (PTO) will be included annually

> Rate will be based on qualifications and experience

> This is a remote work position

> Work hours will need to overlap with standard business hours in California (9:00-6:00pm PT)



HOW TO APPLY

If you are interested in working with us as an independent contractor and you meet the required qualifications listed above, please APPLY HERE -

title: Growth Marketer — Paid Ads + AI + Strategy (Remote)
description:
We're a Canadian AI-powered SaaS agency. We don't do average marketing and we don't hire average marketers.

Formal experience helps, but it's not the gate. If you've run campaigns on your own, tested ideas with small budgets, and can show real results — we want to hear from you.

description:

title: Long-Form YouTube Video Editor – Gaming Video Essays (TheMentok)
description:
TheMentok is a YouTube channel with 119K+ subscribers producing long-form video essays about gaming history, lore, and culture. The flagship series, Origin Oracle, explores the stories behind Nintendo, Sega, and classic gaming franchises through a documentary-style lens  but with personality and humor.



Here's an example of our work: 



Most videos are 25–40 minutes. Some reach 60+ minutes.



What You'd Be Doing:



Editing full-length video essays (25–40 min, occasionally 60+) in Adobe Premiere Pro

Sourcing the majority of B-roll: gameplay footage from longplay channels, archival uploads, Nintendo Directs, magazine scans, print ads, interviews, and more

Placing and timing music (video game OSTs — I provide direction on which tracks and moods)

Adding text pop-ins for names, dates, game titles, and key facts

Creating or placing visual gags and creative transitions that complement the humor in the script

Building 3–5 vertical Shorts from each finished long-form video (reframed for 9:16 with burned-in captions)

Maintaining a running source list for video description credits

Delivering Premiere Pro project files with organized assets



What I Provide:



Final voiceover audio (WAV)

Full script with citations and music direction (specific tracks + mood notes per section)

On-camera footage when applicable

Direct links for rare or specific archival material

A detailed style guide covering audio levels, pacing, sourcing standards, and more



Who I'm Looking For

Must-haves:



Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (if I need to open your project files for urgent fixes)

Experience editing long-form YouTube content (15+ minutes), ideally video essays or documentary-style content

Strong B-roll sourcing instincts — you can watch a script and know what visuals to find without being told shot-by-shot

Reliable audio leveling skills — VO must always be clear and music must sit beneath it

Strong English communication skills and willingness to send daily async updates during active editing

Able to meet deadlines consistently (14-day turnaround per video with milestone check-ins)

I'm looking for one editor to grow with as the channel scales. This would be a long-term partnership if the editor provides good work.



Strong pluses:



You play video games or are a fan of Nintendo, Sega, or classic gaming franchises. This matters because you'll be sourcing gameplay footage and understanding references constantly. If you know the difference between Ocarina of Time and Majora's Mask, you're already ahead.



Experience editing humorous or personality-driven content — not just corporate or tutorial videos. The channel uses dry humor, visual gags, and well-timed cutaways. If your editing portfolio includes 
nts that made someone laugh, I want to see them.



Experience working with heavy B-roll edits where the visuals carry the story (as opposed to talking-head or tutorial content where the footage is straightforward)



Familiarity with YouTube Shorts / vertical content editing



How This Works:



Paid trial edit first. Every new editor starts with a short paid trial — approximately 1–2 minutes of VO from an unreleased video. This is paid regardless of whether we continue together. The goal is to see how our styles mesh. If the trial goes well, we move into full video projects at the agreed rate with a clear milestone schedule.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



A link to your portfolio or 2–3 examples of long-form video editing work (YouTube links preferred). If you have any gaming content in your portfolio, lead with that.



A short paragraph (3–4 sentences) telling me about a creative editing decision you made on a past project that you're proud of — something where you added personality or humor to the edit beyond what the client asked for.



Your per-video rate expectation for a 30–40 minute video essay.

Include the word "Mario" somewhere in your application so I know you read this entire post.

title: Property Operations & Financial Systems Operator (Commercial Real Estate)
description:
This Is Not a VA Job

This is an opportunity to own and run the operations of a commercial real estate asset.

We are building a system-driven real estate company.

No chaos.

No missed details.

No excuses.

If you want a checklist ? don’t apply

If you want ownership ? keep reading



What You’re Walking Into

• 50,000+ SF commercial building 

• Active tenants, leases, vendors 

• Messy Excel systems that need to be rebuilt 

• No fully integrated operating system (yet) 

Your job is to:

Clean it

Systemize it

Run it



The Role

You are responsible for every operational and financial detail of the property.

That includes:

• Rent collection 

• Financial accuracy 

• Tenant coordination 

• Vendor execution 

• System creation 

Nothing gets missed on your watch.



What You Own

Financial System

• Rent roll + tenant ledgers 

• Invoicing (rent + CAM/NNN) 

• Collections + follow-up 

• Weekly reconciliation 

• Monthly CPA-ready financials 



System Building

• Clean and rebuild Excel systems 

• Create simple, scalable workflows 

• Build dashboards for: 

o Cash flow 

o Delinquencies 

o Performance 



Operations

• Manage work orders 

• Assign + track vendors 

• Ensure completion + quality 

• Track expenses + approvals 



Lease & Compliance

• Track lease dates + renewals 

• Lease rolls, coordinate and complete

• Monitor COIs and requirements 

• Flag issues BEFORE they happen 



Reporting

• Weekly dashboard 

• Monthly financial package 

• Clear communication of issues 



What Winning Looks Like

• 98–100% rent collected 

• Clean, accurate financials 

• No missed deadlines 

• Fully systemized workflows 

• Clear reporting at all times 



Compensation

We pay for ownership and results, not just time.



Base Pay

• $1,600 – $2,600/month



Performance Bonuses

1. Collections Performance

• 92% collected = $200 

• 97% = $400 



2. Financial Accuracy

• Clean books + zero errors= $200/month 



3. System Improvements

• Process builds / improvements / automations = $50 each 



4. Execution

• No missed invoices, follow-ups, or deadlines = $200/month 



5. Reporting

• Weekly + monthly reporting delivered on time = $200/month 



Total Compensation Potential

$2,500 – $3,500+/month based on performance



What We’re Looking For

You are:

• Detail-obsessed 

• Process-driven 

• Highly organized 

• Able to take ownership 

You like:

• Fixing broken systems 

• Building new systems

• Making things run smoothly 

• Being responsible for outcomes 



Required Skills

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets (non-negotiable) 

• Bookkeeping / financial operations experience 

• Reconciliation experience 

• Clear communication 



Bonus Skills

Experience with:

• Commercial real estate



How to Apply

If you don’t follow instructions, you will not be considered.



1. Video (2–3 minutes)

Answer:

• What system have you fixed? 

• How do you ensure numbers are always accurate? 

• Why do you want ownership instead of tasks? 



2. Excel Sample

• A spreadsheet you built or improved 

• Explain what you changed 



3. Written Response

• If rent is off by $3,000, how do you find the issue? 



Final Note

We are building a system that scales across multiple properties.



This role will grow into:

Managing multiple assets

Owning operations across a portfolio



If you want a job ? this is not it



If you want to build something ? apply

title: Remote Video Editor (Talking Head & Podcast Content)

—

Justin

Chicago Real Estate Photography

title: Graphic designer
description:
We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented graphic designer who understands both design and performance, someone who can visually communicate a premium brand while driving engagement and conversions.



This role involves creating and managing 2-3
 campaigns per week, ensuring each campaign aligns seamlessly with our brand identity, tone, and overall positioning. It's important that you take the time to truly understand our brand, its values, audience, and standards, so that every piece of content feels intentional and refined.



In addition to
 marketing, you will be responsible for producing weekly promotional graphics for our social platforms (Instagram and
), scheduled and prepared in advance, ready for approval before publishing.

 marketing design (Klaviyo, Omnisend, Mailchimp or similar)

Creating high-converting, visually clean graphics

Understanding branding and maintaining consistency

Working across Instagram and
 content

Planning and scheduling content ahead of time



We are a premium, growing brand, and we value precision, creativity, and efficiency.



To ensure the right fit, we will conduct a 2-week trial phase and select the most suitable candidate based on performance, alignment, and attention to detail.



If you believe you can bring both creativity and structure to a growing brand, apply.

title: Email Designer for DTC
description:
Timezone:

Must be able to work 9-5 GMT



Company Overview:



We are an award-winning
 and SMS marketing agency committed to delivering exceptional results for 7 and 8-Figure DTC brands.



We pride ourselves on fostering a vibrant culture of innovation, initiative, and dedication, ensuring that our team members are equipped to exceed the expectations of our diverse clientele.

Role Summary:



As an
 Designer, you will be the creative force behind our
 campaigns. Your primary responsibility will be to design visually captivating D2C
s that not only capture attention but also resonate with the target audience, leading to higher engagement and conversion rates.

Key Responsibilities:


 Design: Create visually appealing
 templates that resonate with diverse consumer bases. Implement brand guidelines to ensure consistency across all communications.

Collaborate with Stakeholders: You will closely work with our team of Klaviyo specialists to ensure that the
's design complements the copy, and HTML, making the message more impactful.

Use of Design Tools: Proficiently use design tools such as Figma.

User Experience Optimization: Apply principles of UX design to create
s that offer intuitive navigation and drive consumer action.

Stay Updated: Keep up-to-date with the latest design trends and technologies to continuously improve the quality and effectiveness of
 campaigns.

Feedback Implementation: Collaborate with the broader team to gather feedback on
 designs and make necessary revisions to ensure the highest quality.

Desired Skills and Qualifications:

Professional Experience: A minimum of 2 years experience as an
 Designer, Graphic Designer, or similar role with a strong portfolio featuring
 design projects.

Design Proficiency: Expertise in graphic design software (e.g., Figma etc)

Portfolio: A strong portfolio showcasing previous
 design projects with their analytics.

Creativity and Innovation: Ability to produce original ideas and visual concepts that attract attention and encourage reader engagement.

Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy and attention to detail.

Project Management: Ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.

Communication Skills: Excellent communication skills to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

Comprehensive Onboarding and Training:



We are committed to the success and growth of our team members. The successful candidate will benefit from an extensive onboarding process, which includes hands-on training from our senior executives. 



This training will cover all aspects of our operational systems and relevant marketing platforms.



Compensation: 

Details of salary will be explained on application. A competitive salary plus bonus structure will be in place.



Why Join Us?

You'll be part of an innovative team that values creativity and dynamic problem-solving. 



We offer a competitive salary, comprehensive benefits, and opportunities for professional growth in a supportive and ambitious environment.



Beyond initial training, you will receive continuous support and learning opportunities designed to deepen your expertise and enhance your career trajectory. 



Our senior leaders are deeply involved in development sessions, providing insights into advanced strategies and emerging trends in the
 and SMS marketing landscape. 



This direct mentorship and guidance from our top executives ensure that you are well-equipped to handle complex challenges and make significant contributions to our clients’ success.

Selection Process:

After reviewing all applications, shortlisted candidates will be contacted to schedule an initial interview.



Interview #1

The first interview will be followed by a practical task or case study, focusing on your eye for design and ability to carry out instructions.



Interview #2

The second interview will be a discussion via video call where you’ll walk us through your practical case or case study.



Interview #3

Finalists will be invited for a second interview, which might include meeting with senior executives.

Application Process:



Submit Your Application: Please send your resume and a cover letter detailing your relevant experience and why you believe you are a good fit for the role.



Make sure your documents clearly showcase your expertise in
 and SMS marketing, particularly your experience with Klaviyo, Postscript, or Attentive.

/SMS Account Strategist Position."



Required Documents: Attach your resume and cover letter as PDF files to ensure formatting is preserved. Optionally, you may include links to online portfolios or past work samples relevant to
/SMS marketing campaigns.



We look forward to discovering how your talents and aspirations align with the goals. Join us in driving success through innovative
 and SMS marketing strategies!

title: Fashion News Writer
description:
We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Fashion News Writer to join our growing editorial team. This role focuses on fashion trends, celebrity style, runway highlights, beauty trends, luxury brands, and fashion industry news.



The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of global fashion culture, designer brands, and trend-driven storytelling, and can quickly turn trending fashion 
nts into engaging news articles.



Work Schedule



8:00 AM to 4:00 PM (Philippine Time)

Monday to Friday



Key Responsibilities



> Write 4 original fashion news articles per day



> Cover fashion trends, celebrity fashion, runway shows, luxury brands, beauty trends, and viral fashion 
nts



> Monitor fashion events, social media trends, and celebrity style updates



> Research stories using credible fashion and entertainment sources



> Fact-check all information before submission



> Write clear, engaging, and well-structured articles



> Create compelling, SEO-friendly headlines



> Follow editorial guidelines and meet daily deadlines



Requirements:



> At least 2 years of experience in fashion writing, journalism, blogging, or digital publishing



> Strong English writing and grammar skills



> Good understanding of fashion trends, luxury brands, celebrity style, and beauty culture



> Ability to quickly identify trending fashion stories and angles



> Skilled in researching and verifying information from reliable fashion and news sources



> Comfortable covering fashion events, celebrity style 
nts, and industry updates



> Able to work independently and manage daily article output



> Experience with online publishing platforms or CMS is a plus



What We’re Looking For:



> Strong fashion awareness and trend knowledge



> Accuracy and attention to detail



> Strong headline writing skills



> Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality



> Good editorial judgment and understanding of fashion audience interests



> Consistency and reliability in meeting deadlines



If you’re passionate about fashion trends, celebrity style, runway 
nts, and the latest industry buzz — and can consistently deliver engaging, well-researched fashion content — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Data Researcher / Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Description:

We are a US-based real estate investment firm specializing in distressed property acquisitions. We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Data Miner to join our team. Your primary job is to navigate complex US government websites (County Clerk, Tax Assessor, and Court Portals) to pull lists of property owners who are behind on taxes or in probate.



Key Responsibilities:



Daily scraping of County Tax Assessor lists for properties 2+ years delinquent.



Navigating County Clerk portals to find newly filed probate cases.



Organizing data into Google Sheets with 100?curacy.



Filtering data based on specific criteria (e.g., out-of-state owners, high equity).



Requirements:



Proven experience with US Real Estate data (PropStream, BatchLeads, or County Portals).



Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (VLOOKUP, filtering, deduplication).



Must be able to work during US Business hours for at least 2 hours/day for sync-ups.

title: Forensic Genealogist / Skip Tracer
description:
Job Title: Forensic Skip Tracer & Genealogical Researcher

Location: Remote

Salary: $5.00 – $8.00 / hour (Project-based or Part-time)



Description:

We don't just find phone numbers; we find families. We are looking for a specialist who can take the name of a deceased property owner and build a family tree to find their living descendants. You must be an "internet sleuth" who enjoys solving puzzles.



Key Responsibilities:



Use 
, FamilySearch, and social media to find heirs.



Perform deep skip tracing using tools like TLOxp, Skip Genie, or Batch.



Find at least 3-5 verified phone numbers and
s for each heir.



Map out the "Authorized Signer" (the person with the legal right to sign for the estate).



Requirements:



Experience in Genealogy or Private Investigative research.



Expertise in US-based skip tracing tools.



Ability to think critically (e.g., finding an obituary to find the names of children).

title: Cold Caller – Real Estate (Wholesale)
description:
We’re looking for motivated cold callers to reach out to property owners and identify potential real estate deals. Your job is simple: call leads, follow a script, build quick rapport, and pass interested sellers to our acquisitions team.



**Responsibilities:**



* Call a provided list of property owners

* Use a script (we’ll provide it)

* Ask basic questions about the property + motivation to sell

* input those qualified leads into the CRM

* schedule calls with our closer when a lead is interested



**Requirements:**



* Strong communication skills (clear English)

* Comfortable with high call volume (100+ calls/day)

* Reliable internet + quiet work environment

* Sales or cold calling experience preferred (not required)



**Pay:**



$250 Bi-Weekly + 3% on each deal brought in that closed. (potential for extra $300-$600 just from bonus pay alone.)



**What We’re Looking For:**



* People who aren’t afraid of rejection

* Consistent and coachable

* Hungry to make money



**Hours:**



* Flexible (preferably during U.S. daytime hours) 9am-5pm Monday-Friday with breaks as long as hitting targeted numbers daily.

(Weekends Off)



**Extra**



*The team will join a quick group call every other day before calling to go over call recordings and quick coaching lessons.

title: Part-Time Blog Editor - NYC Hip Hop Culture
description:
FiveBoroFlow is an NYC hip hop culture page covering rap lyrics, artist news, and street culture across all five boroughs.

We are looking for a part-time editor to review and polish 3-5 blog posts per week. Your job is to edit for tone, clarity, and authenticity while preserving NYC slang and rap culture voice. Do NOT sanitize the writing or make it sound corporate.

You should be familiar with artists like Jay-Z, Nas, Cardi B, Pop Smoke, Fivio Foreign, and Lil TJay. You do not need to be an expert on day one but you need to respect the culture and learn fast.

To apply send: a short intro, 3 NYC rappers you know well and why, your rate, and any samples if you have them. Shortlisted candidates will receive a paid test task.

I am looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help improve my website, optimize content for SEO, and support consistent content creation. I need someone who is very skilled in SEO work and social media. I need someone well versed in ranking for Google, keywords, website content, etc.

This is a long-term role for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and able to follow clear direction. Must be open to taking on additional tasks in the future. Starting at approximately 10 hours per week but likely to increase in the future.

title: Short-Form Video Clipper (TikTok /YouTube Shorts/Reels/X)
description:
We are looking for motivated short-form video clippers to join our growing ClipEngage community. Your role is simple: find viral-worthy moments from long-form content and turn them into engaging short clips for platforms like TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels.



No experience required. No followers needed. Just consistency, creativity, and willingness to learn.



What You’ll Do:



Edit short clips from provided or sourced long-form content

Add captions, hooks, and engaging edits to improve retention

Follow simple viral editing guidelines

Post or submit clips depending on assigned client

Work with creators, streamers, and brands



Requirements:



Basic video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

Understanding of short-form content (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)

Good internet connection and consistent availability

Willingness to improve and follow feedback

No experience needed (training can be provided)



What We Offer:



$1–3 CPM (earn per 1,000 views your clips generate)

Access to clients from YouTube, Twitch, podcasts & brands

Opportunity to grow into a full-time editor or manager

Supportive community inside ClipEngage Whop

Performance-based scaling (better clips = more earnings)



About ClipEngage:

ClipEngage is building a high-performance clipping community focused on turning long-form content into viral short-form clips. We help creators grow while giving editors a way to earn online through performance-based payouts.



No need to apply here! You can join ClipEngage on whop: 



In ClipEngage we value your efforts.

title: Full Stack Video Editor & AI Image Designer
description:
What you'll do:

Edit UGC footage and raw clips into performance-ready Meta ads using the briefs I provide to you. Cut talking head and VSL-style video from briefs and put B-roll on top of it. Design static image ads using AI tools, Figma, Canva - whatever your toolset is. Produce ad variations for structured creative testing. Turn briefs into finished assets with minimal back-and-forth. Own your queue and hit deadlines. Pretty much follow my guidelines and do what I ask from you to do. If I need high quality image ads - you design them. If I need 5 video's edited for launching ads - you edit them. 



What you need: Experience editing for Meta specifically. A portfolio with proof of your work. Experience with AI. Up to date to the latest trends. Able to use AI while maintaining high quality - no AI slop.



I'm a 22-year-old entrepreneur running a portfolio of businesses. Every venture I'm involved in is either equity-based or a high-conviction ownership position. That's the context you're stepping into. 



The portfolio you're supporting:

InfinityGlobal — co-founded, majority shareholder. Quantified trading portfolio making consistent investment returns accessible for regular investors. Responsible for full business and growth side.

Belgian HVAC company — equity stake, sole marketing responsibility, €70K last quarter at 1:10 ROAS. Scaling aggressively.



Both are equity-based businesses. As they grow, what's on the table for you grows with them.



As we grow, demand will grow. You can easily turn this into a fulltime job. Bonuses included. If you're on my team you'll be doing very well in life - i'm all about supporting my people. 



Core values & Expectations:

Truth over comfort. We'd rather be right than liked. Feedback here is direct, decisions are made on data, and bad ideas get called out regardless of who had them. If you need softening before you can hear something, this won't work.



High agency, no excuses. When something breaks, we fix it. When something's unclear, we figure it out. Nobody here is waiting for permission or motivation — you show up, you execute, you deliver. Obstacles are problems to solve, not reasons to stall.



Never satisfied. Good enough to test is not the same as good enough to settle for. We iterate constantly — on creative, on strategy, on ourselves. The standard isn't what we shipped last week. It's what we know we're capable of.



No 9-5 mindset - I have high standards, work all hours of the day and work with a sense of urgency. I am passionate about my goals and my business and expect you to have high standards as well.



Role: Full-time, remote. Start ASAP. As demand grows hours will grow. Its said that desired number of hours per week is 20, but it can go up to way more really quick.

No portfolio, no review. No agencies.
